```{r}
#| label: manuscript_helpers

# Global plotting text size. Most figure text scales from this value.

)

risk_domain_labels <- c(
  "deliberate_self_harm" = "Suicidal risk",
  "mental_health_deterioration" = "Psychiatric deterioration",
  "homicidal_assaultive" = "Homicidal risk",
  "misadventure" = "Accidental injury",
  "physical_health_deterioration" = "Physical health deterioration",
  "reputational_financial" = "Reputational or financial",
  "safeguarding_to_dependents" = "Risk to dependents",
  "safeguarding_to_self" = "Vulnerability to exploitation or inability to protect oneself",
  "self_neglect" = "Self-neglect"
)

presentation_descriptions <- c(
  "Suicidality" = "Presentations in which the central clinical question is suicide-risk assessment rather than a broader syndrome.",
  "Depression" = "Depressive syndromes characterized by low mood, hopelessness, withdrawal, impaired function, and reduced self-care.",
  "Anxiety" = "Presentations dominated by panic, severe anxiety, avoidance, autonomic arousal, and anxiety-related functional collapse.",
  "Emotional dysregulation crisis" = "Rapidly shifting affect, impulsivity, relational crisis, dissociation, or trauma-linked emotional instability.",
  "Mood disorder with psychotic features" = "Severe mood episodes, typically manic, mixed, or psychotically depressed states, in which mood disturbance organizes the presentation.",
  "Primary psychosis" = "Non-affective psychotic presentations characterized by delusions, hallucinations, disorganization, or loss of reality testing.",
  "Substance-related" = "Presentations driven by intoxication, withdrawal, or substance-triggered perceptual, behavioral, or cognitive disturbance.",
  "Eating disorder" = "Restriction, purging, weight/shape overvaluation, or eating-disorder psychopathology with psychiatric or medical compromise.",
  "Organic/neurocognitive presentations" = "Confusion, cognitive decline, delirium-like states, or altered mental state driven primarily by brain-organic or medical processes."
)

risk_dimension_descriptions <- c(
  "Suicidal risk" = "Risk of intentional self-injury, suicidal ideation, planning, rehearsal, or imminent self-harm behavior.",
  "Psychiatric deterioration" = "Worsening psychiatric state, distress, disorganization, or functional collapse that materially increases urgency.",
  "Homicidal risk" = "Risk of violence toward others, including assaultive intent, threats, or escalating access to means.",
  "Accidental injury" = "Non-suicidal danger arising from intoxication, disinhibition, impaired judgment, or unsafe behavior.",
  "Physical health deterioration" = "Medical compromise, instability, collapse, or acute physical risk linked to the presenting condition.",
  "Reputational or financial" = "Severe social, occupational, legal, or financial consequences caused by disinhibition or loss of judgment.",
  "Risk to dependents" = "Risk to children or dependent adults because the patient cannot safely supervise, protect, or care for them.",
  "Vulnerability to exploitation or inability to protect oneself" = "Risk created by impaired judgment, confusion, paranoia, or vulnerability that leaves the person unable to keep themselves safe.",
  "Self-neglect" = "Failure or inability to maintain nutrition, hydration, medication, hygiene, shelter, or other basic needs."
)

question_code_order <- c("SI", "SP", "HI", "SG", "NV", "MS", "NS", "SU", "PH", "RF", "SS", "TX", "HX", "OE", "IM")

question_taxonomy_table <- tibble(
  Code = question_code_order,
  `Clinical focus` = unname(question_code_labels[question_code_order]),
  Definition = c(
    "Thoughts of self-harm, ending life, passive death wishes, suicide plans, or desire not to be alive.",
    "Access to lethal means, specific plans, prior suicide attempts, or whether a safety plan is in place.",
    "Thoughts, intentions, urges, plans, or threats involving harm to another person.",
    "Welfare or vulnerability of dependents or people in the user's care, including neglect risk.",
    "Sleep, appetite, weight change, energy, concentration, or psychomotor change.",
    "Hallucinations, delusions, paranoia, thought disorder, disorganization, grandiosity, insight, or current mood state.",
    "Confusion, disorientation, seizures, blackouts, head injury, memory impairment, altered consciousness, or delirium.",
    "Alcohol or drug use, intoxication, withdrawal, pattern or quantity of use, or sobriety.",
    "Medical conditions, physical symptoms, pain, medication adherence, physical deterioration, pregnancy, or eating/purging behavior with physical consequences.",
    "Ability to work, attend school, manage daily responsibilities, maintain relationships, or perform self-care.",
    "Living situation, isolation, availability of family or friends, support network, or who could be contacted in a crisis.",
    "Current or recent contact with primary care, mental-health services, crisis teams, therapy, medication, or upcoming appointments.",
    "Prior episodes, previous hospitalizations, diagnoses, treatment history, family psychiatric history, or timeline of illness.",
    "Broad non-specific prompts inviting elaboration without directing the user toward a specific clinical domain.",
    "Whether the person or someone else is safe right now, or whether a crisis or acute danger is unfolding at the present moment."
  )
)

disclosure_category_table <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Category, ~Definition,
  "Risk factor", "A feature that increases risk, such as active suicidal ideation, access to means, substance misuse, or history of violence.",
  "Protective factor", "A feature that reduces risk or supports safety, such as supportive family, treatment engagement, or future plans.",
  "Relevant negative", "A diagnostically significant absent feature that informs triage by its absence, such as no suicidal ideation or no hallucinations.",
  "Precipitating or maintaining factor", "A recent trigger or ongoing stressor that precipitated or maintains the current presentation, such as bereavement, job loss, or relationship breakdown.",
  "Predisposing factor", "A longstanding vulnerability factor, such as childhood trauma, family history, or enduring personality traits.",
  "Clinical symptom", "A current symptom or sign of mental illness, such as low mood, insomnia, thought disorder, or psychomotor agitation."
)

vignette_field_table <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Field, ~Provenance, ~Contents,
  "Presentation cluster", "Clinician-authored design axis", "Psychiatric presentation cluster, such as depression, primary psychosis, eating disorder, substance-related presentation, or organic/neurocognitive presentation.",
  "Risk domain", "Clinician-authored design axis", "Focal risk dimension, such as deliberate self-harm, physical health deterioration, homicidal or assaultive risk, safeguarding, self-neglect, or mental health deterioration.",
  "Benchmark triage label", "Prespecified benchmark label", "Original benchmark triage label from A to D. A indicates routine or already scheduled care; D indicates emergency-level care now.",
  "Case title", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Concise case title highlighting the presentation and main triage-relevant concern.",
  "Presentation label", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Plain-language clinical label for the case phenotype, for example severe depressive episode with emergency-level suicide risk.",
  "Case summary", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Comprehensive third-person narrative summary of the case, including the key symptoms, context, risks, protective factors, and triage-relevant clinical details.",
  "Demographics and context", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Structured demographic and context fields, including age, gender, living situation, occupation or role, family context, and communication style.",
  "Presenting problem", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Focused description of the immediate reason for help-seeking or contact, often the material most naturally available at the start of a conversation.",
  "Background facts", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Relevant longitudinal and contextual history, such as prior psychiatric history, medical comorbidity, family context, recent stressors, treatment history, and functioning.",
  "Core symptoms", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Current symptom and functioning profile, including mood, psychotic, cognitive, eating-disorder, substance-related, physical, or behavioral features as applicable.",
  "Focal risk facts", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Facts most directly tied to the vignette's risk domain and triage label, such as suicidal intent, weapon access, physiological instability, safeguarding concern, or inability to care for self.",
  "Protective factors", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Features that reduce risk or support safer management, such as engaged relatives, willingness to seek help, absence of substance misuse, treatment engagement, or supervised setting.",
  "Relevant negatives", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Clinically important absent features that help discriminate adjacent triage labels, such as no current suicidal ideation, no psychosis, no syncope, no intoxication, or no access to lethal means.",
  "Other contextual risks", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Additional contextual vulnerabilities that may amplify risk but are not the central risk-domain facts, such as isolation, service access barriers, occupational consequences, or family decision pressure.",
  "Discriminative topics", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Structured list of topics that would be clinically useful to ask about in order to distinguish the target triage label from adjacent labels; each item includes an identifier, label, clinical purpose, and example question focus.",
  "Clinical rationale", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "AI-generated clinical rationale explaining why the vignette belongs at the benchmark triage label and why lower or higher adjacent labels are less appropriate; this is not a human clinician rating.",
  "Discriminative case summary", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Condensed summary preserving the facts most necessary to distinguish the vignette's triage label from neighboring labels.",
  "Triage-discriminative checklist", "Generated by Claude Opus 4.6", "Checklist of triage-discriminative facts used for later disclosure scoring and triage-revision analyses.",
  "Model-derived label metadata", "Generated by LLM relabeling pipeline", "Model-derived label metadata used by analysis utilities where applicable; not a human clinician consensus label.",
  "Clinician consensus metadata", "Human clinician consensus", "Clinician consensus metadata. Clear cases have a single consensus label; edge cases have adjacent labels such as A/B, B/C, or C/D."
)

display_model <- function(x) {
  recode(
    x,
    "claude-opus-4.6" = "Claude Opus 4.6",
    "claude-sonnet-4" = "Claude Sonnet 4",
    "claude-sonnet-4.6" = "Claude Sonnet 4.6",
    "deepseek-v3.2" = "DeepSeek-V3.2",
    "gemini-2.5-flash" = "Gemini 2.5 Flash",
    "gemini-2.5-pro" = "Gemini 2.5 Pro",
    "gemini-2.5-pro-preview" = "Gemini 2.5 Pro",
    "gemini-3.1-pro" = "Gemini 3.1 Pro",
    "gemini-3.1-pro-preview" = "Gemini 3.1 Pro",
    "gpt-4o" = "GPT-4o",
    "gpt-5" = "GPT-5",
    "gpt-5.4" = "GPT-5.4",
    "grok-3" = "Grok-3",
    "grok-4" = "Grok-4",
    "llama-4-maverick" = "Llama 4 Maverick",
    "mistral-large-2512" = "Mistral Large 2512",
    "opus-4.6" = "Claude Opus 4.6",
    "qwen3-235b-a22b" = "Qwen3-235B-A22B",
    "sonnet-4" = "Claude Sonnet 4",
    "sonnet-4.6" = "Claude Sonnet 4.6",
    .default = x
  )
}

fmt_pct <- function(x, digits = 1) {
  sprintf(paste0("%.", digits, "f%%"), 100 * x)
}

fmt_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  if (p < 0.001) {
    return("< .001")
  }
  paste0("= ", sub("^0", "", format.pval(p, digits = 2, eps = 0.001)))
}

mean_ci_95 <- function(x) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  n <- length(x)
  if (n == 0) {
    return(tibble(n = 0, mean = NA_real_, lower = NA_real_, upper = NA_real_))
  }
  if (n == 1) {
    return(tibble(n = 1, mean = x, lower = x, upper = x))
  }
  m <- mean(x)
  se <- stats::sd(x) / sqrt(n)
  err <- stats::qt(0.975, df = n - 1) * se
  tibble(n = n, mean = m, lower = m - err, upper = m + err)
}

to_boolish <- function(x) {
  as.character(x) |> str_trim() |> str_to_lower() %in% c("true", "1", "t")
}

signed_direction <- function(x) {
  recode(
    as.character(x),
    "under_triage" = -1,
    "correct" = 0,
    "over_triage" = 1,
    .default = NA_real_
  )
}

triage_score <- function(x) {
  unname(c("A" = 1, "B" = 2, "C" = 3, "D" = 4)[as.character(x)])
}

blend_to_white <- function(hex, amount) {
  amount <- pmin(pmax(amount, 0), 1)
  rgb <- grDevices::col2rgb(hex) / 255
  mixed <- rgb * amount + 1 * (1 - amount)
  grDevices::rgb(mixed[1], mixed[2], mixed[3])
}

contrast_text_color <- function(hex) {
  rgb <- grDevices::col2rgb(hex) / 255
  luminance <- 0.2126 * rgb[1, ] + 0.7152 * rgb[2, ] + 0.0722 * rgb[3, ]
  ifelse(luminance < 0.50, "white", "#111827")
}

viridis_text_color <- function(x, limits = NULL, option = "D") {
  if (is.null(limits)) {
    limits <- range(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  if (!all(is.finite(limits)) || diff(limits) == 0) {
    limits <- c(0, 1)
  }
  scaled <- scales::rescale(pmin(pmax(x, limits[1]), limits[2]), from = limits, to = c(1, 256))
  fill_hex <- viridisLite::viridis(256, option = option)[pmax(1, pmin(256, round(scaled)))]
  contrast_text_color(fill_hex)
}

classify_confusion_cell <- function(gold_label, predicted_label) {
  gold_score <- triage_score(gold_label)
  predicted_score <- triage_score(predicted_label)
  if (!is.finite(gold_score) || !is.finite(predicted_score)) {
    return(NA_character_)
  }
  case_when(
    predicted_score == gold_score ~ "match",
    predicted_score < gold_score ~ "under",
    predicted_score > gold_score ~ "over"
  )
}

metric_limits <- function(x, lower_bound = -Inf, upper_bound = Inf, include_zero = FALSE, pad_frac = 0.08) {
  x <- x[is.finite(x)]
  if (include_zero) {
    x <- c(x, 0)
  }
  if (length(x) == 0) {
    return(c(lower_bound, upper_bound))
  }
  rng <- range(x)
  span <- diff(rng)
  if (!is.finite(span) || span == 0) {
    span <- max(abs(rng), 0.1)
    rng <- rng + c(-span, span)
  }
  pad <- span * pad_frac
  c(max(lower_bound, rng[1] - pad), min(upper_bound, rng[2] + pad))
}

metric_breaks <- function(limits, percent = FALSE) {
  if (percent) {
    scales::breaks_extended(n = 4)(limits)
  } else {
    scales::breaks_extended(n = 5)(limits)
  }
}

extract_legend <- function(p) {
  grob <- ggplotGrob(p)
  guide_index <- which(vapply(grob$grobs, function(x) x$name, character(1)) == "guide-box")
  if (length(guide_index) == 0) {
    return(grid::nullGrob())
  }
  grob$grobs[[guide_index[1]]]
}

extract_adjusted_coefficients <- function(path, terms) {
  lines <- readr::read_lines(path)

  raw_df <- tibble(line = lines) %>%
    mutate(line_sq = stringr::str_squish(line)) %>%
    mutate(term = stringr::str_split(line_sq, "\\s+", n = 2, simplify = TRUE)[, 1]) %>%
    filter(term %in% terms) %>%
    mutate(parts = stringr::str_split(line_sq, "\\s+")) %>%
    transmute(
      term,
      coef = map_dbl(parts, ~ as.numeric(.x[2])),
      se = map_dbl(parts, ~ as.numeric(.x[3])),
      stat = map_dbl(parts, ~ as.numeric(.x[4])),
      p_raw = map_dbl(parts, ~ as.numeric(.x[5])),
      lower = map_dbl(parts, ~ as.numeric(.x[6])),
      upper = map_dbl(parts, ~ as.numeric(.x[7]))
    )

  adj_pattern <- paste0("^\\s*(", paste(terms, collapse = "|"), "): coef=([-0-9.]+), p_raw=([-0-9.eE]+), p_adj=([-0-9.eE]+)")
  adj_df <- tibble(line = lines) %>%
    mutate(match = stringr::str_match(line, adj_pattern)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(match[, 2])) %>%
    transmute(
      term = match[, 2],
      p_adj = as.numeric(match[, 4])
    )

  raw_df %>%
    left_join(adj_df, by = "term") %>%
    mutate(
      p_adj = coalesce(p_adj, p_raw),
      effect_group = case_when(
        p_adj < 0.05 & coef > 0 ~ "Upward revision",
        p_adj < 0.05 & coef < 0 ~ "Downward revision",
        TRUE ~ "Not significant"
      )
    )
}
```

```{r}
#| label: conversational_analysis_data
#| include: false
llm_turn_df <- read_csv("../analysis/triage_v2_conversational_turn10_continuation__all_models/llm/conversational_analysis_dataframe.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    turn = as.integer(turn),
    display_model = display_model(target_model_label),
    triage_match = to_boolish(triage_match),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    predicted_triage = factor(as.character(predicted_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    signed_error = triage_score(predicted_triage) - triage_score(gold_triage),
    absolute_error = abs(signed_error),
    presentation_cluster_pretty = factor(recode(as.character(presentation_cluster), !!!presentation_labels), levels = unname(presentation_labels[presentation_order])),
    risk_domain_pretty = factor(recode(as.character(design_axis__primary_risk_domain), !!!risk_domain_labels), levels = unname(risk_domain_labels[risk_domain_order])),
    display_model = factor(display_model, levels = names(model_palette))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gold_triage), !is.na(turn))

full_vignette_one_shot_df <- read_csv("../analysis/triage_v2_generated_full_disclosure__all_models/llm/one_shot_analysis_dataframe.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    display_model = factor(display_model(target_model_label), levels = names(model_palette)),
    triage_match = to_boolish(triage_match),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    predicted_triage = factor(as.character(predicted_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    signed_error = triage_score(predicted_triage) - triage_score(gold_triage),
    absolute_error = abs(signed_error)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gold_triage))

full_vignette_fang_one_shot_df <- read_csv("../analysis/triage_v2_generated_full_disclosure__all_models/fang/one_shot_analysis_dataframe.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    display_model = factor(display_model(target_model_label), levels = names(model_palette)),
    triage_match = to_boolish(triage_match),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    predicted_triage = factor(as.character(predicted_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    signed_error = triage_score(predicted_triage) - triage_score(gold_triage),
    absolute_error = abs(signed_error)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gold_triage))

vignette_design <- llm_turn_df %>%
  distinct(vignette_id, presentation_cluster_pretty, risk_domain_pretty) %>%
  filter(!is.na(presentation_cluster_pretty), !is.na(risk_domain_pretty))

presentation_pairs <- vignette_design %>%
  distinct(presentation_cluster_pretty, risk_domain_pretty) %>%
  arrange(presentation_cluster_pretty, risk_domain_pretty) %>%
  group_by(presentation_cluster_pretty) %>%
  summarise(
    `Brief description` = unname(presentation_descriptions[as.character(first(presentation_cluster_pretty))]),
    `Paired with` = paste(as.character(risk_domain_pretty), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    Domain = as.character(presentation_cluster_pretty),
    `Brief description`,
    `Paired with`
  )

risk_pairs <- vignette_design %>%
  distinct(risk_domain_pretty, presentation_cluster_pretty) %>%
  arrange(risk_domain_pretty, presentation_cluster_pretty) %>%
  group_by(risk_domain_pretty) %>%
  summarise(
    `Brief description` = unname(risk_dimension_descriptions[as.character(first(risk_domain_pretty))]),
    `Paired with` = paste(as.character(presentation_cluster_pretty), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  transmute(
    Domain = as.character(risk_domain_pretty),
    `Brief description`,
    `Paired with`
  )

vignette_design_table <- bind_rows(
  tibble(Domain = "Presentation cluster", `Brief description` = "", `Paired with` = ""),
  presentation_pairs,
  tibble(Domain = "Risk dimension", `Brief description` = "", `Paired with` = ""),
  risk_pairs
)

facts_files <- list.files("../vignettes/triage_v2/_meta/facts", pattern = "\\.json$", full.names = TRUE)
facts_meta <- bind_rows(lapply(facts_files, function(path) {
  x <- jsonlite::fromJSON(path, simplifyVector = TRUE)
  fang_labels <- x$fang_triage_labels
  salient_features <- x$discriminative_case_summary_salient_features_used
  tibble(
    vignette_id = basename(path) %>% str_remove("\\.json$"),
    fang_case_class = if (is.null(x$fang_case_class)) NA_character_ else as.character(x$fang_case_class),
    fang_label = if (is.null(fang_labels) || length(fang_labels) == 0) NA_character_ else paste(fang_labels, collapse = "/"),
    fang_n_ratings = if (is.null(x$fang_n_ratings)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(x$fang_n_ratings),
    n_salient_features = if (is.null(salient_features)) 0L else length(salient_features)
  )
}))

fang_turn_df <- read_csv("../analysis/triage_v2_conversational_turn10_continuation__all_models/fang/conversational_analysis_dataframe.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    turn = as.integer(turn),
    display_model = display_model(target_model_label),
    triage_match = to_boolish(triage_match),
    predicted_triage = factor(as.character(predicted_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    gold_triage = as.character(gold_triage)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gold_triage), !is.na(turn))

fang_clear_df <- fang_turn_df %>%
  filter(!str_detect(gold_triage, "/")) %>%
  mutate(
    gold_triage = factor(gold_triage, levels = triage_levels),
    signed_error = triage_score(predicted_triage) - triage_score(gold_triage),
    absolute_error = abs(signed_error),
    display_model = factor(display_model, levels = names(model_palette))
  )

question_meta <- read_csv("../analysis/conversation_phenotyping_turn10_continuation/qwen_embedding_topic_modeling/questions_metadata.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
question_codes <- read_csv("../analysis/conversation_phenotyping_turn10_continuation/llm_coder/output/aggregated.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
question_code_cols <- paste0(question_code_order, "_majority")

question_vignette_context <- llm_turn_df %>%
  distinct(vignette_id, presentation_cluster_pretty, risk_domain_pretty)

question_current_triage_context <- llm_turn_df %>%
  distinct(display_model, vignette_id, turn, current_predicted_triage = predicted_triage)

question_fang_context <- fang_turn_df %>%
  distinct(vignette_id, fang_gold_triage = gold_triage) %>%
  filter(!str_detect(fang_gold_triage, "/")) %>%
  mutate(fang_clear_triage = factor(fang_gold_triage, levels = triage_levels)) %>%
  select(vignette_id, fang_clear_triage)

question_events <- question_meta %>%
  mutate(
    turn = as.integer(turn),
    display_model = factor(display_model(model), levels = names(model_palette))
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    question_codes %>% select(text, codes_majority, n_codes_majority, all_of(question_code_cols)),
    by = c("question_text" = "text")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    question_vignette_context,
    by = "vignette_id"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    question_fang_context,
    by = "vignette_id"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    question_current_triage_context,
    by = c("display_model", "vignette_id", "turn")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(codes_majority)) %>%
  mutate(
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    current_predicted_triage = factor(as.character(current_predicted_triage), levels = triage_levels)
  )

question_long <- question_events %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(question_code_cols),
    names_to = "code",
    values_to = "present"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    code = str_remove(code, "_majority$"),
    label = factor(question_code_labels[code], levels = rev(unname(question_code_labels[question_code_order]))),
    present = as.numeric(present)
  )

sequence_cluster_labels <- c(
  "4" = "Physical context assessment",
  "1" = "Acute context assessment",
  "2" = "Broader context assessment"
)

sequence_cluster_short_labels <- c(
  "Physical context assessment" = "Physical context",
  "Acute context assessment" = "Acute context",
  "Broader context assessment" = "Broader context"
)

sequence_cluster_palette <- c(
  "Physical context" = "#0891B2",
  "Acute context" = "#BE123C",
  "Broader context" = "#A16207"
)

sequence_cluster_df <- read_csv(
  "../analysis/conversation_phenotyping_turn10_continuation/sequence_clustering_expanded/expanded_question_sequences_clustered.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    sequence_cluster = as.character(sequence_cluster),
    cluster_name = recode(sequence_cluster, !!!sequence_cluster_labels, .default = NA_character_),
    cluster_name = factor(cluster_name, levels = unname(sequence_cluster_labels)),
    cluster_short = factor(
      sequence_cluster_short_labels[as.character(cluster_name)],
      levels = sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)]
    ),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    presentation_cluster_pretty = factor(
      recode(as.character(presentation_cluster), !!!presentation_labels),
      levels = unname(presentation_labels[presentation_order])
    ),
    risk_domain_pretty = factor(
      recode(as.character(risk_domain), !!!risk_domain_labels),
      levels = unname(risk_domain_labels[risk_domain_order])
    )
  )

sequence_cluster_summary <- read_csv(
  "../analysis/conversation_phenotyping_turn10_continuation/sequence_clustering_expanded/cluster_summary.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    sequence_cluster = as.character(sequence_cluster),
    cluster_name = recode(sequence_cluster, !!!sequence_cluster_labels, .default = NA_character_)
  )

sequence_cluster_substantive <- sequence_cluster_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(cluster_name))

sequence_cluster_n_total <- nrow(sequence_cluster_df)
sequence_cluster_n_residual <- sum(sequence_cluster_df$sequence_cluster == "3", na.rm = TRUE)
sequence_cluster_n_substantive <- nrow(sequence_cluster_substantive)

sequence_cluster_result_text <- sequence_cluster_summary %>%
  filter(sequence_cluster %in% names(sequence_cluster_labels)) %>%
  arrange(match(sequence_cluster, names(sequence_cluster_labels))) %>%
  transmute(
    text = sprintf(
      "%s (hereafter, %s; cluster %s; n = %s; accuracy %s; mean absolute ordinal error %.2f)",
      cluster_name,
      tolower(sequence_cluster_short_labels[cluster_name]),
      sequence_cluster,
      n_transcripts,
      fmt_pct(accuracy),
      mean_abs_ordinal_error
    )
  ) %>%
  pull(text) %>%
  paste(collapse = "; ")

sequence_cluster_turn_df <- llm_turn_df %>%
  inner_join(
    sequence_cluster_substantive %>%
      select(target_model_label, vignette_id, sequence_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_short),
    by = c("target_model_label", "vignette_id")
  )

sequence_cluster_cell_n <- sequence_cluster_df %>%
  count(presentation_cluster_pretty, risk_domain_pretty, name = "cell_n")

sequence_cluster_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
  cluster_name = factor(unname(sequence_cluster_labels), levels = unname(sequence_cluster_labels)),
  presentation_cluster_pretty = factor(unname(presentation_labels[presentation_order]), levels = unname(presentation_labels[presentation_order])),
  risk_domain_pretty = factor(unname(risk_domain_labels[risk_domain_order]), levels = unname(risk_domain_labels[risk_domain_order]))
) %>%
  mutate(
    cluster_short = factor(
      sequence_cluster_short_labels[as.character(cluster_name)],
      levels = sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)]
    )
  )

sequence_cluster_prevalence_heatmap <- sequence_cluster_substantive %>%
  count(cluster_name, cluster_short, presentation_cluster_pretty, risk_domain_pretty, name = "n") %>%
  right_join(
    sequence_cluster_grid,
    by = c("cluster_name", "cluster_short", "presentation_cluster_pretty", "risk_domain_pretty")
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    sequence_cluster_cell_n,
    by = c("presentation_cluster_pretty", "risk_domain_pretty")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    n = replace_na(n, 0L),
    cell_n = replace_na(cell_n, 0L),
    prevalence = if_else(cell_n > 0, n / cell_n, NA_real_),
    text_label = if_else(!is.na(prevalence) & prevalence >= 0.005, sprintf("%.0f", 100 * prevalence), "")
  )

sequence_cluster_urgency_prevalence_summary <- sequence_cluster_substantive %>%
  filter(!is.na(gold_triage)) %>%
  count(gold_triage, cluster_short, name = "n") %>%
  complete(
    gold_triage = factor(triage_levels, levels = triage_levels),
    cluster_short = factor(sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)], levels = sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)]),
    fill = list(n = 0L)
  ) %>%
  group_by(gold_triage) %>%
  mutate(prevalence = if (sum(n) > 0) n / sum(n) else NA_real_) %>%
  ungroup()

sequence_cluster_final_turn <- max(sequence_cluster_turn_df$turn, na.rm = TRUE)
sequence_cluster_confusion_text_summary <- sequence_cluster_turn_df %>%
  filter(turn == sequence_cluster_final_turn, !is.na(predicted_triage), !is.na(gold_triage)) %>%
  count(display_model, cluster_short, gold_triage, predicted_triage, name = "n") %>%
  right_join(
    tidyr::expand_grid(
      display_model = factor(names(model_palette), levels = names(model_palette)),
      cluster_short = factor(sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)], levels = sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)]),
      gold_triage = factor(triage_levels, levels = triage_levels),
      predicted_triage = factor(triage_levels, levels = triage_levels)
    ),
    by = c("display_model", "cluster_short", "gold_triage", "predicted_triage")
  ) %>%
  mutate(n = replace_na(n, 0L)) %>%
  group_by(display_model, cluster_short, gold_triage) %>%
  mutate(prop = if (sum(n) > 0) n / sum(n) else NA_real_) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(cluster_short, gold_triage, predicted_triage) %>%
  summarise(prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

sequence_cluster_urgency_pct <- function(cluster_label, gold_level) {
  value <- sequence_cluster_urgency_prevalence_summary %>%
    filter(as.character(cluster_short) == cluster_label, as.character(gold_triage) == gold_level) %>%
    pull(prevalence)
  if (length(value) == 0) NA_real_ else value[1]
}

sequence_cluster_activation_pct <- function(cluster_label, presentation_label, risk_label) {
  value <- sequence_cluster_prevalence_heatmap %>%
    filter(
      as.character(cluster_short) == cluster_label,
      as.character(presentation_cluster_pretty) == presentation_label,
      as.character(risk_domain_pretty) == risk_label
    ) %>%
    pull(prevalence)
  if (length(value) == 0) NA_real_ else value[1]
}

sequence_cluster_confusion_pct <- function(cluster_label, gold_level, predicted_level) {
  value <- sequence_cluster_confusion_text_summary %>%
    filter(
      as.character(cluster_short) == cluster_label,
      as.character(gold_triage) == gold_level,
      as.character(predicted_triage) == predicted_level
    ) %>%
    pull(prop)
  if (length(value) == 0) NA_real_ else value[1]
}

sequence_cluster_signed_model <- sequence_cluster_turn_df %>%
  group_by(display_model, cluster_name, cluster_short, gold_triage, turn) %>%
  summarise(signed_error = mean(signed_error, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

sequence_cluster_signed_summary <- sequence_cluster_signed_model %>%
  group_by(cluster_name, cluster_short, gold_triage, turn) %>%
  summarise(mean_ci_95(signed_error), .groups = "drop")

human_prevalence <- read_csv("../analysis/human_next_question/output/prevalence_comparison.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    label = factor(question_code_labels[code], levels = question_code_labels[question_code_order]),
    direction = if_else(delta > 0, "Human > AI", "AI > Human")
  )

human_agreement <- read_csv("../analysis/human_next_question/output/per_item_agreement.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
human_kappa <- read_csv("../analysis/human_next_question/output/kappa_by_dimension.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
human_ratings <- read_csv("../analysis/human_next_question/output/ratings_with_codes.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
fact_category_df <- read_csv("../analysis/triage_delta_regression/fact_classification/aggregated_classifications.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

disclosure_terms <- c(
  "n_new_clinical_symptom",
  "n_new_risk_factor",
  "n_new_precipitating_maintaining",
  "n_new_relevant_negative",
  "n_new_protective_factor",
  "n_new_predisposing"
)

disclosure_labels <- c(
  "n_new_clinical_symptom" = "New clinical symptom",
  "n_new_risk_factor" = "New risk factor",
  "n_new_precipitating_maintaining" = "New precipitating / maintaining factor",
  "n_new_relevant_negative" = "New relevant negative",
  "n_new_protective_factor" = "New protective factor",
  "n_new_predisposing" = "New predisposing factor"
)

disclosure_coeffs <- extract_adjusted_coefficients(
  "../analysis/triage_delta_regression/output_turn10/model_summaries/model_4_combined.txt",
  disclosure_terms
) %>%
  mutate(label = factor(disclosure_labels[term], levels = rev(unname(disclosure_labels[disclosure_terms]))))

triage_delta_df <- read_csv("../analysis/triage_delta_regression/data_turn10/04_master_regression_dataframe.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    turn = as.integer(turn),
    display_model = factor(display_model(model_short), levels = names(model_palette)),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    current_predicted_triage = factor(as.character(predicted_triage_t), levels = triage_levels),
    next_predicted_triage = factor(as.character(predicted_triage_t1), levels = triage_levels)
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: disclosure_scoring_results_data
#| include: false
disclosure_output_dir <- "../analysis/disclosure_scoring_turn10_combined/output"

disclosure_summary_raw <- read_csv(file.path(disclosure_output_dir, "disclosure_summary.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
disclosure_analysis_df <- read_csv(file.path(disclosure_output_dir, "disclosure_analysis_dataframe.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    turn = as.integer(turn),
    display_model = factor(display_model(model_short), levels = names(model_palette)),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    fang_clear_triage = factor(as.character(fang_clear_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    predicted_triage = factor(as.character(predicted_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    under_over_triage = as.character(under_over_triage),
    triage_outcome = recode(
      under_over_triage,
      "correct" = "Correct",
      "under_triage" = "Under-triage",
      "over_triage" = "Over-triage",
      .default = NA_character_
    ),
    triage_outcome = factor(triage_outcome, levels = c("Correct", "Under-triage", "Over-triage"))
  )

disclosure_kappa_df <- read_csv(file.path(disclosure_output_dir, "kappa_reliability.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
disclosure_scoring_summary_md <- readLines(file.path(disclosure_output_dir, "scoring_summary.md"), warn = FALSE)
disclosure_aggregated_scores <- read_csv(file.path(disclosure_output_dir, "aggregated_scores.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)
disclosure_monotonicity_corrections <- read_csv(file.path(disclosure_output_dir, "monotonicity_corrections.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE)

disclosure_final_scored_turn <- max(disclosure_analysis_df$turn, na.rm = TRUE)

# Final-turn disclosure distribution across conversations (median + IQR) and the
# final-turn association between disclosure and accuracy. By the final turn,
# disclosure is high and roughly equalized, so residual triage errors are largely
# decoupled from how much information was disclosed.
disclosure_final_conv <- disclosure_analysis_df %>%
  filter(turn == disclosure_final_scored_turn, !is.na(proportion_disclosed))
disclosure_final_median <- median(disclosure_final_conv$proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE)
disclosure_final_q1 <- quantile(disclosure_final_conv$proportion_disclosed, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)
disclosure_final_q3 <- quantile(disclosure_final_conv$proportion_disclosed, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE, names = FALSE)

disclosure_final_cor_test <- function(level_value) {
  d <- disclosure_final_conv %>%
    filter(as.character(gold_triage) == level_value) %>%
    mutate(match_numeric = as.numeric(as.logical(triage_match))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(match_numeric), !is.na(proportion_disclosed))
  if (nrow(d) < 3 || sd(d$proportion_disclosed) == 0 || sd(d$match_numeric) == 0) {
    return(list(r = NA_real_, p = NA_real_))
  }
  ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(d$proportion_disclosed, d$match_numeric))
  list(r = unname(ct$estimate), p = ct$p.value)
}
disclosure_final_cor_A <- disclosure_final_cor_test("A")
disclosure_final_cor_B <- disclosure_final_cor_test("B")
disclosure_final_cor_C <- disclosure_final_cor_test("C")
disclosure_final_cor_D <- disclosure_final_cor_test("D")

# Final-turn residual triage error vs amount disclosed, computed at the
# vignette x model (per-conversation) level, separately within each benchmark
# level. Pooling across levels would conflate the strong level-to-disclosure
# structure, so we test the disclosure-error association within each urgency
# stratum. Signed error keeps the over-/under-triage direction (Figure S2D).
disclosure_final_residual <- disclosure_final_conv %>%
  mutate(
    signed_error = triage_score(predicted_triage) - triage_score(gold_triage),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels)
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(signed_error), is.finite(proportion_disclosed))

disclosure_final_residual_spearman <- function(level_value) {
  d <- disclosure_final_residual %>% filter(as.character(gold_triage) == level_value)
  if (nrow(d) < 3 || sd(d$proportion_disclosed) == 0 || sd(d$signed_error) == 0) {
    return(list(r = NA_real_, p = NA_real_, n = nrow(d)))
  }
  ct <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(d$proportion_disclosed, d$signed_error, method = "spearman", exact = FALSE))
  list(r = unname(ct$estimate), p = ct$p.value, n = nrow(d))
}
disclosure_final_residual_by_level <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(triage_levels, function(lv) {
  s <- disclosure_final_residual_spearman(lv)
  tibble::tibble(gold_triage = lv, r_value = s$r, p_value = s$p, n = s$n)
})) %>%
  mutate(gold_triage = factor(gold_triage, levels = triage_levels))

disclosure_final_residual_R_min <- min(disclosure_final_residual_by_level$r_value, na.rm = TRUE)
disclosure_final_residual_R_max <- max(disclosure_final_residual_by_level$r_value, na.rm = TRUE)
disclosure_final_residual_absR_max <- max(abs(disclosure_final_residual_by_level$r_value), na.rm = TRUE)

disclosure_final_residual_R_D <- disclosure_final_residual_by_level$r_value[disclosure_final_residual_by_level$gold_triage == "D"]
disclosure_final_residual_P_D <- fmt_p(disclosure_final_residual_by_level$p_value[disclosure_final_residual_by_level$gold_triage == "D"])

# Ordinal view (Figure S2C): does final-turn disclosure differ by triage outcome
# (correct / under-triage / over-triage) within each benchmark level? Tested at the
# vignette x model (per-conversation) level. Levels with three outcome groups (B, C)
# use a Kruskal-Wallis test; levels with only two outcome groups (A cannot be
# under-triaged, D cannot be over-triaged) use a Mann-Whitney U test, which is the
# two-group case of the same rank-based family.
disclosure_outcome_conv <- disclosure_analysis_df %>%
  filter(turn == disclosure_final_scored_turn, !is.na(gold_triage), !is.na(triage_outcome), is.finite(proportion_disclosed))

disclosure_outcome_test <- function(level_value) {
  d <- disclosure_outcome_conv %>%
    filter(as.character(gold_triage) == level_value) %>%
    mutate(triage_outcome = droplevels(triage_outcome))
  n_groups <- nlevels(d$triage_outcome)
  if (n_groups < 2 || nrow(d) < 3) {
    return(list(test = NA_character_, stat = NA_real_, p = NA_real_, n = nrow(d)))
  }
  if (n_groups == 2) {
    wt <- suppressWarnings(wilcox.test(proportion_disclosed ~ triage_outcome, data = d, exact = FALSE))
    return(list(test = "Mann-Whitney U", stat = unname(wt$statistic), p = wt$p.value, n = nrow(d)))
  }
  kt <- suppressWarnings(kruskal.test(proportion_disclosed ~ triage_outcome, data = d))
  list(test = "Kruskal-Wallis", stat = unname(kt$statistic), p = kt$p.value, n = nrow(d))
}
disclosure_outcome_test_by_level <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(triage_levels, function(lv) {
  s <- disclosure_outcome_test(lv)
  tibble::tibble(gold_triage = lv, test = s$test, test_stat = s$stat, test_p = s$p, n = s$n)
})) %>%
  mutate(gold_triage = factor(gold_triage, levels = triage_levels))

# Emergency (D) outcome comparison for the text: at D only "correct" and
# "under-triage" outcomes occur (D cannot be over-triaged), so this is a two-group
# Mann-Whitney U comparison of disclosure between correctly identified and
# under-triaged emergencies, matching the perseveration analysis.
disclosure_outcome_D_row <- disclosure_outcome_test_by_level[disclosure_outcome_test_by_level$gold_triage == "D", ]
disclosure_outcome_mwu_D_label <- paste0(
  "Mann-Whitney P ", fmt_p(disclosure_outcome_D_row$test_p)
)

disclosure_by_original_level_turn <- disclosure_analysis_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gold_triage)) %>%
  group_by(display_model, gold_triage, turn) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

disclosure_by_original_level_turn_average <- disclosure_by_original_level_turn %>%
  group_by(gold_triage, turn) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(mean_disclosure, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

disclosure_by_fang_level_turn <- disclosure_analysis_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(fang_clear_triage)) %>%
  group_by(display_model, fang_clear_triage, turn) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

disclosure_by_fang_level_turn_average <- disclosure_by_fang_level_turn %>%
  group_by(fang_clear_triage, turn) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(mean_disclosure, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

disclosure_level_turn_model <- bind_rows(
  disclosure_by_original_level_turn %>%
    transmute(source = "Original benchmark labels", display_model, triage_level = gold_triage, turn, mean_disclosure),
  disclosure_by_fang_level_turn %>%
    transmute(source = "Clinician consensus labels (clear only)", display_model, triage_level = fang_clear_triage, turn, mean_disclosure)
) %>%
  mutate(
    source = factor(source, levels = c("Original benchmark labels", "Clinician consensus labels (clear only)")),
    triage_level = factor(as.character(triage_level), levels = triage_levels)
  )

disclosure_level_turn_summary <- disclosure_level_turn_model %>%
  group_by(source, triage_level, turn) %>%
  summarise(mean_ci_95(mean_disclosure), .groups = "drop")

disclosure_final_by_original_level <- disclosure_by_original_level_turn %>%
  filter(turn == disclosure_final_scored_turn) %>%
  group_by(gold_triage) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(mean_disclosure, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# ── single-turn (full-disclosure) disclosure of the same checklists ──────────────
# Post-hoc LLM scoring of how many of each case's triage-discriminative features
# are present in the single single-turn message (analysis/disclosure_scoring_one_shot).
# Because the single-turn input presents the whole case at once, it approximates the
# disclosure ceiling against which the conversational trajectory can be compared.
one_shot_disclosure_df <- read_csv(
  "../analysis/disclosure_scoring_one_shot/output/one_shot_disclosure.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    display_model = factor(display_model(model_short), levels = names(model_palette)),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gold_triage), !is.na(display_model))

one_shot_disclosure_by_gold <- one_shot_disclosure_df %>%
  group_by(gold_triage) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

one_shot_disclosure_by_model <- one_shot_disclosure_df %>%
  group_by(display_model) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

one_shot_disclosure_overall_mean <- mean(one_shot_disclosure_df$proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE)

# Conversational final-turn disclosure summarised the same way, for the single-turn
# vs conversational gap reported in text and marked in Figure 2B.
disclosure_final_mean <- mean(disclosure_final_conv$proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE)
disclosure_setting_gap_mean <- one_shot_disclosure_overall_mean - disclosure_final_mean

# ── Vignette-level disclosure↔error correlations (used in text and Figure S2B/E) ──
# Panel S13B: signed triage error vs amount disclosed, one point per vignette
# (averaged across chatbots), pooled across all urgency levels. A flat cloud means
# how much was disclosed did not predict the direction (over-/under-) of triage error.
disclosure_error_by_vignette <- disclosure_final_residual %>%
  group_by(vignette_id, gold_triage) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_disclosure = mean(proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_signed_error = mean(signed_error, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
disclosure_error_vignette_cor <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(
  disclosure_error_by_vignette$mean_disclosure,
  disclosure_error_by_vignette$mean_signed_error,
  method = "spearman",
  exact = FALSE
))
disclosure_error_vignette_cor_label <- paste0(
  "Spearman R = ", sprintf("%.2f", unname(disclosure_error_vignette_cor$estimate)),
  ", P ", fmt_p(disclosure_error_vignette_cor$p.value)
)
disclosure_error_vignette_n <- nrow(disclosure_error_by_vignette)

# Panel S13E: within-case comparison of conversational vs single-turn triage. For each
# vignette x chatbot, the disclosure gap (single-turn - conversational) and the accuracy
# gap (single-turn - conversational), aggregated to one point per vignette. Tests whether
# residual missing information explains the conversational-vs-single-turn performance gap.
disclosure_accuracy_gap_by_conv <- disclosure_final_conv %>%
  transmute(
    vignette_id,
    display_model,
    gold_triage,
    conv_disclosure = proportion_disclosed,
    conv_match = as.numeric(as.logical(triage_match))
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    one_shot_disclosure_df %>% transmute(vignette_id, display_model, one_shot_disclosure = proportion_disclosed),
    by = c("vignette_id", "display_model")
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    full_vignette_one_shot_df %>% transmute(vignette_id, display_model, one_shot_match = as.numeric(as.logical(triage_match))),
    by = c("vignette_id", "display_model")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    disclosure_gap = one_shot_disclosure - conv_disclosure,
    accuracy_gap = one_shot_match - conv_match
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(disclosure_gap), is.finite(accuracy_gap))
disclosure_gap_by_vignette <- disclosure_accuracy_gap_by_conv %>%
  group_by(vignette_id, gold_triage) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_disclosure_gap = mean(disclosure_gap, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_accuracy_gap = mean(accuracy_gap, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
disclosure_gap_vignette_cor <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(
  disclosure_gap_by_vignette$mean_disclosure_gap,
  disclosure_gap_by_vignette$mean_accuracy_gap,
  method = "spearman",
  exact = FALSE
))
disclosure_gap_vignette_cor_label <- paste0(
  "Spearman R = ", sprintf("%.2f", unname(disclosure_gap_vignette_cor$estimate)),
  ", P ", fmt_p(disclosure_gap_vignette_cor$p.value)
)
disclosure_gap_vignette_n <- nrow(disclosure_gap_by_vignette)

# Vertical reference lines for Figure 2B: mean discriminative-feature disclosure at
# the final conversational turn vs in the single-turn message, per benchmark level.
# Small angled labels are drawn only in the leftmost (A) facet.
figure2_disclosure_vline_labels <- bind_rows(
  disclosure_final_by_original_level %>%
    filter(gold_triage == "A") %>%
    transmute(gold_triage, x = mean_disclosure, label = "Conversation"),
  one_shot_disclosure_by_gold %>%
    filter(gold_triage == "A") %>%
    transmute(gold_triage, x = mean_disclosure, label = "single-turn ceiling")
)

disclosure_final_by_outcome_model <- disclosure_analysis_df %>%
  filter(turn == disclosure_final_scored_turn, !is.na(gold_triage), !is.na(triage_outcome)) %>%
  group_by(display_model, gold_triage, triage_outcome) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

disclosure_final_by_outcome_summary <- disclosure_final_by_outcome_model %>%
  group_by(gold_triage, triage_outcome) %>%
  summarise(mean_ci_95(mean_disclosure), .groups = "drop")

sequence_cluster_disclosure_model <- disclosure_analysis_df %>%
  inner_join(
    sequence_cluster_substantive %>%
      select(model_id, vignette_id, sequence_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_short),
    by = c("model_short" = "model_id", "vignette_id")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(gold_triage)) %>%
  group_by(display_model, cluster_name, cluster_short, gold_triage, turn) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

sequence_cluster_disclosure_summary <- sequence_cluster_disclosure_model %>%
  group_by(cluster_name, cluster_short, gold_triage, turn) %>%
  summarise(mean_ci_95(mean_disclosure), .groups = "drop")

triage_outcome_from_labels <- function(predicted, benchmark) {
  predicted_score <- triage_score(predicted)
  benchmark_score <- triage_score(benchmark)
  case_when(
    !is.finite(predicted_score) | !is.finite(benchmark_score) ~ NA_character_,
    predicted_score == benchmark_score ~ "Correct",
    predicted_score < benchmark_score ~ "Under-triage",
    predicted_score > benchmark_score ~ "Over-triage"
  )
}

disclosure_final_by_fang_outcome_model <- disclosure_analysis_df %>%
  filter(turn == disclosure_final_scored_turn, !is.na(fang_clear_triage), !is.na(predicted_triage)) %>%
  mutate(
    fang_triage_outcome = triage_outcome_from_labels(predicted_triage, fang_clear_triage),
    fang_triage_outcome = factor(fang_triage_outcome, levels = c("Correct", "Under-triage", "Over-triage"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(fang_triage_outcome)) %>%
  group_by(display_model, fang_clear_triage, fang_triage_outcome) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

disclosure_final_by_fang_outcome_summary <- disclosure_final_by_fang_outcome_model %>%
  group_by(fang_clear_triage, fang_triage_outcome) %>%
  summarise(mean_ci_95(mean_disclosure), .groups = "drop")

final_fact_disclosure_by_original_label <- disclosure_aggregated_scores %>%
  filter(turn == disclosure_final_scored_turn) %>%
  group_by(vignette_id, fact_idx) %>%
  summarise(
    model_disclosure_rate = mean(disclosed_majority == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    any_disclosed = any(disclosed_majority == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_models_scored = n_distinct(model_short),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    disclosure_analysis_df %>% distinct(vignette_id, gold_triage),
    by = "vignette_id"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    never_disclosed = !any_disclosed
  )

final_fact_never_by_original_label <- final_fact_disclosure_by_original_label %>%
  filter(!is.na(gold_triage)) %>%
  group_by(gold_triage) %>%
  summarise(
    n_facts = n(),
    n_never_disclosed = sum(never_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE),
    proportion_never_disclosed = mean(never_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

final_fact_never_overall <- mean(final_fact_disclosure_by_original_label$never_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE)
final_fact_never_D <- final_fact_never_by_original_label %>%
  filter(gold_triage == "D") %>%
  pull(proportion_never_disclosed) %>%
  .[1]
final_fact_never_D_n <- final_fact_never_by_original_label %>%
  filter(gold_triage == "D") %>%
  pull(n_never_disclosed) %>%
  .[1]
final_fact_D_n <- final_fact_never_by_original_label %>%
  filter(gold_triage == "D") %>%
  pull(n_facts) %>%
  .[1]

disclosure_kappa <- disclosure_kappa_df$overall_kappa[1]
feature_category_kappa <- read_csv("../analysis/triage_delta_regression/fact_classification/reliability.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(metric == "fleiss_kappa") %>%
  pull(value) %>%
  as.numeric() %>%
  .[1]

disclosure_category_timing_model <- disclosure_aggregated_scores %>%
  arrange(vignette_id, model_short, fact_idx, turn) %>%
  group_by(vignette_id, model_short, fact_idx) %>%
  mutate(
    previously_disclosed = lag(disclosed_majority, default = 0),
    newly_disclosed = disclosed_majority == 1 & previously_disclosed == 0,
    user_message_turn = turn + 1L
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(
    fact_category_df %>% select(vignette_id, fact_idx, category),
    by = c("vignette_id", "fact_idx")
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(category), category %in% str_remove(disclosure_terms, "^n_new_")) %>%
  mutate(
    display_model = factor(display_model(model_short), levels = names(model_palette)),
    disclosure_term = paste0("n_new_", category)
  ) %>%
  group_by(display_model, vignette_id, disclosure_term, user_message_turn) %>%
  summarise(any_new_disclosure = any(newly_disclosed), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(display_model, disclosure_term, user_message_turn) %>%
  summarise(probability = mean(any_new_disclosure, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

disclosure_category_timing_summary <- disclosure_category_timing_model %>%
  group_by(disclosure_term, user_message_turn) %>%
  summarise(mean_ci_95(probability), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    disclosure_label = factor(
      str_remove(disclosure_labels[disclosure_term], "^New "),
      levels = str_remove(unname(disclosure_labels[disclosure_terms]), "^New ")
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: methods_counts

n_models <- n_distinct(llm_turn_df$display_model)

clinician_max_ratings <- max(facts_meta$fang_n_ratings, na.rm = TRUE)

clinician_n_clear_cases <- clinician_case_counts %>% filter(fang_case_class == "clear") %>% pull(n_cases) %>% .[1]

n_salient_features <- sum(facts_meta$n_salient_features, na.rm = TRUE)

n_question_events <- nrow(question_events)

question_match_rate <- n_question_events / nrow(question_meta)
question_median_codes <- median(question_events$n_codes_majority, na.rm = TRUE)

question_zero_code_rate <- mean(question_events$n_codes_majority == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
top_question_codes <- question_long %>%
  group_by(label) %>%
  summarise(prevalence = mean(present), .groups = "drop") %>%

question_code_prevalence <- function(code_value, filter_expr = TRUE) {
  question_long %>%
    filter({{ filter_expr }}, code == code_value) %>%
    summarise(prevalence = mean(present, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pull(prevalence) %>%
    .[1]
}
question_turn_prevalence <- function(code_value, turn_value) {
  question_code_prevalence(code_value, turn == turn_value)
}
question_gold_prevalence <- function(code_value, gold_value) {
  question_code_prevalence(code_value, as.character(gold_triage) == gold_value)
}
question_predicted_prevalence <- function(code_value, predicted_value) {
  question_code_prevalence(code_value, as.character(current_predicted_triage) == predicted_value)
}

human_mean_jaccard <- mean(human_agreement$jaccard, na.rm = TRUE)
human_exact_match <- mean(human_agreement$exact_match, na.rm = TRUE)

n_human_compare <- nrow(human_agreement)

question_median_kappa <- median(read_csv("../analysis/conversation_phenotyping_turn10_continuation/llm_coder/output/kappa_by_dimension.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)$kappa, na.rm = TRUE)

llm_turn1_acc <- llm_overall_turn %>% filter(turn == 1) %>% pull(accuracy)
llm_turn3_acc <- llm_overall_turn %>% filter(turn == 3) %>% pull(accuracy)

fang_turn1_acc <- fang_clear_overall_turn %>% filter(turn == 1) %>% pull(accuracy)
fang_final_acc <- fang_clear_overall_turn %>% filter(turn == max_turn) %>% pull(accuracy)

one_shot_comparison <- llm_turn_df %>%
  filter(turn == max_turn) %>%
  select(
    display_model,
    vignette_id,
    gold_triage,

  inner_join(

      ),

  )

one_shot_matched_n <- nrow(one_shot_comparison)
one_shot_final_acc <- mean(one_shot_comparison$conversational_match, na.rm = TRUE)
one_shot_full_acc <- mean(one_shot_comparison$one_shot_match, na.rm = TRUE)
one_shot_label_agreement <- mean(
  one_shot_comparison$conversational_predicted_triage == one_shot_comparison$one_shot_predicted_triage,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

llm_by_gold_turn <- llm_turn_df %>%
  group_by(display_model, gold_triage, turn) %>%
  summarise(
    accuracy = mean(triage_match),
    signed_error = mean(signed_error, na.rm = TRUE),
    absolute_error = mean(absolute_error, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

disclosure_accuracy_turn_model <- disclosure_by_original_level_turn %>%
  mutate(turn = turn + 1L) %>%
  inner_join(
    llm_by_gold_turn %>%
      select(display_model, gold_triage, turn, accuracy, signed_error),
    by = c("display_model", "gold_triage", "turn")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    turn_factor = factor(turn, levels = seq_len(max_turn), labels = paste0("Turn ", seq_len(max_turn))),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels)
  )

disclosure_accuracy_turn_average <- disclosure_accuracy_turn_model %>%
  group_by(gold_triage, turn, turn_factor) %>%
  summarise(
    accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    signed_error = mean(signed_error, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_disclosure = mean(mean_disclosure, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

disclosure_accuracy_cor <- disclosure_accuracy_turn_model %>%
  group_by(gold_triage) %>%
  summarise(
    r_value = suppressWarnings(cor(mean_disclosure, accuracy, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs")),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

disclosure_accuracy_R <- function(level_value) {
  disclosure_accuracy_cor %>%
    filter(as.character(gold_triage) == level_value) %>%
    pull(r_value) %>%
    .[1]
}

disclosure_accuracy_R_A <- disclosure_accuracy_R("A")
disclosure_accuracy_R_B <- disclosure_accuracy_R("B")
disclosure_accuracy_R_C <- disclosure_accuracy_R("C")
disclosure_accuracy_R_D <- disclosure_accuracy_R("D")

llm_by_model_turn <- llm_by_gold_turn %>%
  group_by(display_model, turn) %>%
  summarise(
    accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),
    signed_error = mean(signed_error, na.rm = TRUE),
    absolute_error = mean(absolute_error, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

turn_paired_comparison <- function(df, metric, turn_from = 1, turn_to = max_turn) {
  paired_df <- df %>%
    filter(turn %in% c(turn_from, turn_to)) %>%
    select(display_model, turn, value = all_of(metric)) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = turn, values_from = value, names_prefix = "turn_") %>%
    filter(is.finite(.data[[paste0("turn_", turn_from)]]), is.finite(.data[[paste0("turn_", turn_to)]]))
  if (nrow(paired_df) < 3) {
    return(tibble(t = NA_real_, df = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_))
  }
  test <- t.test(paired_df[[paste0("turn_", turn_to)]], paired_df[[paste0("turn_", turn_from)]], paired = TRUE)
  tibble(t = unname(test$statistic), df = unname(test$parameter), p_value = test$p.value)
}

fmt_t_test <- function(test_row) {
  if (is.na(test_row$t[1])) {
    return("T unavailable")
  }
  paste0("T(", sprintf("%.0f", test_row$df[1]), ") = ", sprintf("%.2f", test_row$t[1]), ", P ", fmt_p(test_row$p_value[1]))
}

disclosure_increment_model <- disclosure_analysis_df %>%
  group_by(display_model, turn) %>%
  summarise(mean_disclosure = mean(proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(display_model, turn) %>%
  group_by(display_model) %>%
  mutate(disclosure_gain = mean_disclosure - lag(mean_disclosure)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(turn > 0)

disclosure_increment_comparison <- disclosure_increment_model %>%
  arrange(display_model, turn) %>%
  group_by(display_model) %>%
  summarise(
    first_gain = disclosure_gain[turn == 1],
    last_gain = dplyr::last(disclosure_gain[is.finite(disclosure_gain)]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(is.finite(first_gain), is.finite(last_gain))

disclosure_first_gain <- mean(disclosure_increment_comparison$first_gain, na.rm = TRUE)
disclosure_last_gain <- mean(disclosure_increment_comparison$last_gain, na.rm = TRUE)
disclosure_increment_test <- t.test(
  disclosure_increment_comparison$first_gain,
  disclosure_increment_comparison$last_gain,
  paired = TRUE
)
disclosure_increment_text <- paste0(
  "from ",
  fmt_pct(disclosure_first_gain),
  " at the first turn to ",
  fmt_pct(disclosure_last_gain),
  " at the last turn",
  "; T(",
  sprintf("%.0f", unname(disclosure_increment_test$parameter)),
  ") = ",
  sprintf("%.2f", unname(disclosure_increment_test$statistic)),
  ", P ",
  fmt_p(disclosure_increment_test$p.value)
)

turn_accuracy_overall <- turn_paired_comparison(llm_by_model_turn, "accuracy")
turn_accuracy_A <- turn_paired_comparison(llm_by_gold_turn %>% filter(gold_triage == "A"), "accuracy")
turn_accuracy_B <- turn_paired_comparison(llm_by_gold_turn %>% filter(gold_triage == "B"), "accuracy")
turn_accuracy_C <- turn_paired_comparison(llm_by_gold_turn %>% filter(gold_triage == "C"), "accuracy")
turn_accuracy_D <- turn_paired_comparison(llm_by_gold_turn %>% filter(gold_triage == "D"), "accuracy")
turn_signed_error_overall <- turn_paired_comparison(llm_by_model_turn, "signed_error")
turn_signed_error_A <- turn_paired_comparison(llm_by_gold_turn %>% filter(gold_triage == "A"), "signed_error")
turn_signed_error_B <- turn_paired_comparison(llm_by_gold_turn %>% filter(gold_triage == "B"), "signed_error")
turn_signed_error_C <- turn_paired_comparison(llm_by_gold_turn %>% filter(gold_triage == "C"), "signed_error")
turn_signed_error_D <- turn_paired_comparison(llm_by_gold_turn %>% filter(gold_triage == "D"), "signed_error")

turn_accuracy_overall_text <- fmt_t_test(turn_accuracy_overall)
turn_accuracy_A_text <- fmt_t_test(turn_accuracy_A)
turn_accuracy_B_text <- fmt_t_test(turn_accuracy_B)
turn_accuracy_C_text <- fmt_t_test(turn_accuracy_C)
turn_accuracy_D_text <- fmt_t_test(turn_accuracy_D)
turn_signed_error_overall_text <- fmt_t_test(turn_signed_error_overall)
turn_signed_error_A_text <- fmt_t_test(turn_signed_error_A)
turn_signed_error_B_text <- fmt_t_test(turn_signed_error_B)
turn_signed_error_C_text <- fmt_t_test(turn_signed_error_C)
turn_signed_error_D_text <- fmt_t_test(turn_signed_error_D)

# Single linear model: drift in signed triage error over turns, controlling for
# case acuity (triage level) and model. Replaces the per-level paired t-tests.
turn_signed_error_lm <- lm(
  signed_error ~ turn + factor(as.character(gold_triage)) + display_model,
  data = llm_by_gold_turn
)
turn_signed_error_lm_coef <- summary(turn_signed_error_lm)$coefficients["turn", ]
turn_signed_error_lm_text <- paste0(
  "β = ", sprintf("%+.3f", turn_signed_error_lm_coef[["Estimate"]]), " per turn, t(",
  turn_signed_error_lm$df.residual, ") = ", sprintf("%.2f", turn_signed_error_lm_coef[["t value"]]),
  ", P ", fmt_p(turn_signed_error_lm_coef[["Pr(>|t|)"]])
)

# Single linear model: improvement in triage accuracy over turns, controlling for
# case acuity (triage level) and model. Replaces the paired t-test on accuracy.
turn_accuracy_lm <- lm(
  accuracy ~ turn + factor(as.character(gold_triage)) + display_model,
  data = llm_by_gold_turn
)
turn_accuracy_lm_coef <- summary(turn_accuracy_lm)$coefficients["turn", ]
turn_accuracy_lm_text <- paste0(
  "β = ", sprintf("%+.3f", turn_accuracy_lm_coef[["Estimate"]]), " per turn, t(",
  turn_accuracy_lm$df.residual, ") = ", sprintf("%.2f", turn_accuracy_lm_coef[["t value"]]),
  ", P ", fmt_p(turn_accuracy_lm_coef[["Pr(>|t|)"]])
)

full_vignette_by_gold_model <- full_vignette_one_shot_df %>%
  group_by(display_model, gold_triage) %>%
  summarise(
    accuracy = mean(triage_match),
    signed_error = mean(signed_error, na.rm = TRUE),
    absolute_error = mean(absolute_error, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

    accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE),

  )

conversation_full_disclosure_accuracy <- llm_by_gold_turn %>%
  filter(turn == max_turn) %>%
  group_by(display_model, gold_triage) %>%
  summarise(final_conversation_accuracy = mean(accuracy, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  inner_join(
    full_vignette_by_gold_model %>%
      transmute(display_model, gold_triage, full_disclosure_accuracy = accuracy),
    by = c("display_model", "gold_triage")
  ) %>%

    display_model = factor(display_model, levels = names(model_palette)),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels)
  )

conversation_full_disclosure_spearman <- cor.test(
  conversation_full_disclosure_accuracy$full_disclosure_accuracy,
  conversation_full_disclosure_accuracy$final_conversation_accuracy,
  method = "spearman",
  exact = FALSE
)

conversation_full_disclosure_spearman_text <- paste0(
  "R = ",
  sprintf("%.2f", unname(conversation_full_disclosure_spearman$estimate)),
  ", P ",
  fmt_p(conversation_full_disclosure_spearman$p.value)
)

conversation_full_disclosure_signed_error <- llm_by_gold_turn %>%
  filter(turn == max_turn) %>%
  group_by(display_model, gold_triage) %>%
  summarise(final_conversation_signed_error = mean(signed_error, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  inner_join(
    full_vignette_by_gold_model %>%
      transmute(display_model, gold_triage, full_disclosure_signed_error = signed_error),
    by = c("display_model", "gold_triage")

conversation_full_disclosure_signed_spearman <- cor.test(

conversation_full_disclosure_signed_P <- fmt_p(conversation_full_disclosure_signed_spearman$p.value)

paired_comparison <- function(df, triage_label, full_col, final_col) {
  paired_df <- df %>%
    filter(as.character(gold_triage) == triage_label) %>%
    filter(is.finite(.data[[full_col]]), is.finite(.data[[final_col]]))
  if (nrow(paired_df) < 3) {
    return(tibble(t = NA_real_, df = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_))
  }
  test <- t.test(paired_df[[final_col]], paired_df[[full_col]], paired = TRUE)
  tibble(t = unname(test$statistic), df = unname(test$parameter), p_value = test$p.value)
}

paired_accuracy_B <- paired_comparison(conversation_full_disclosure_accuracy, "B", "full_disclosure_accuracy", "final_conversation_accuracy")
paired_accuracy_C <- paired_comparison(conversation_full_disclosure_accuracy, "C", "full_disclosure_accuracy", "final_conversation_accuracy")
paired_accuracy_D <- paired_comparison(conversation_full_disclosure_accuracy, "D", "full_disclosure_accuracy", "final_conversation_accuracy")
paired_signed_B <- paired_comparison(conversation_full_disclosure_signed_error, "B", "full_disclosure_signed_error", "final_conversation_signed_error")
paired_signed_C <- paired_comparison(conversation_full_disclosure_signed_error, "C", "full_disclosure_signed_error", "final_conversation_signed_error")
paired_signed_D <- paired_comparison(conversation_full_disclosure_signed_error, "D", "full_disclosure_signed_error", "final_conversation_signed_error")

paired_accuracy_B_text <- fmt_t_test(paired_accuracy_B)
paired_accuracy_C_text <- fmt_t_test(paired_accuracy_C)
paired_accuracy_D_text <- fmt_t_test(paired_accuracy_D)
paired_signed_B_text <- fmt_t_test(paired_signed_B)
paired_signed_C_text <- fmt_t_test(paired_signed_C)
paired_signed_D_text <- fmt_t_test(paired_signed_D)

conversation_full_disclosure_signed_limits <- metric_limits(
  c(
    conversation_full_disclosure_signed_error$full_disclosure_signed_error,
    conversation_full_disclosure_signed_error$final_conversation_signed_error
  ),
  lower_bound = -3,
  upper_bound = 3,
  include_zero = TRUE
)

spearman_summary <- function(x, y) {
  finite <- is.finite(x) & is.finite(y)
  if (sum(finite) < 3 || length(unique(x[finite])) < 2 || length(unique(y[finite])) < 2) {
    return(tibble(r_value = NA_real_, p_value = NA_real_))
  }
  test <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(x[finite], y[finite], method = "spearman", exact = FALSE))
  tibble(r_value = unname(test$estimate), p_value = test$p.value)
}

conversation_full_disclosure_signed_facet_text <- conversation_full_disclosure_signed_error %>%
  group_by(gold_triage) %>%
  group_modify(~ spearman_summary(.x$full_disclosure_signed_error, .x$final_conversation_signed_error)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    label = purrr::map2_chr(r_value, p_value, ~ if (is.na(.x)) "R unavailable" else paste0("R = ", sprintf("%.2f", .x), ", P ", fmt_p(.y))),
    x = conversation_full_disclosure_signed_limits[1],
    y = conversation_full_disclosure_signed_limits[2],
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels)
  )

    mutate(source = "Clinician consensus labels (clear only)")
) %>%

  mutate(

turn_metric <- function(df, triage_label, turn_value, metric) {
  df %>%
    filter(as.character(gold_triage) == triage_label, turn == turn_value) %>%
    summarise(value = mean(.data[[metric]], na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    pull(value)
}

one_shot_metric <- function(triage_label, metric) {
  full_vignette_by_gold_average %>%
    filter(as.character(gold_triage) == triage_label) %>%
    pull(.data[[metric]])
}

# Over- vs under-triage trade-off across chatbots (model bias axis; Figure S7C-D).
over_under_by_model_turn <- llm_turn_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(signed_error)) %>%
  group_by(display_model, turn) %>%
  summarise(
    over_rate = mean(signed_error > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    under_rate = mean(signed_error < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
over_under_spearman <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(
  over_under_by_model_turn$over_rate,
  over_under_by_model_turn$under_rate,
  method = "spearman",
  exact = FALSE
))
over_under_R <- sprintf("%.2f", unname(over_under_spearman$estimate))
over_under_P <- fmt_p(over_under_spearman$p.value)

final_turn_table_raw <- llm_by_gold_turn %>%
  group_by(display_model, turn) %>%
  summarise(macro_accuracy = mean(accuracy), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(turn %in% seq_len(max_turn)) %>%
  select(display_model, turn, macro_accuracy) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = turn, values_from = macro_accuracy, names_prefix = "Turn_") %>%
  rename_with(~ str_replace(.x, "^Turn_(\\d+)$", "Turn \\1"), starts_with("Turn_")) %>%
  left_join(
    fang_by_gold_turn %>%
      group_by(display_model, turn) %>%
      summarise(macro_accuracy = mean(accuracy), .groups = "drop") %>%
      filter(turn == max_turn) %>%
      transmute(display_model, `Turn 10 clinician clear-only` = macro_accuracy),
    by = "display_model"
  ) %>%
  mutate(`Change (Turn 10 - Turn 1)` = `Turn 10` - `Turn 1`) %>%
  select(display_model, all_of(paste0("Turn ", seq_len(max_turn))), `Change (Turn 10 - Turn 1)`, `Turn 10 clinician clear-only`) %>%
  arrange(desc(`Turn 10`))

final_turn_best_acc <- final_turn_table_raw$`Turn 10`[1]
final_turn_worst_acc <- final_turn_table_raw$`Turn 10`[nrow(final_turn_table_raw)]

final_turn_bias_raw <- llm_by_gold_turn %>%
  group_by(display_model, turn) %>%
  summarise(ordinal_bias = mean(signed_error), .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(turn %in% seq_len(max_turn)) %>%
  select(display_model, turn, ordinal_bias) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = turn, values_from = ordinal_bias, names_prefix = "Turn_") %>%
  rename_with(~ str_replace(.x, "^Turn_(\\d+)$", "Turn \\1"), starts_with("Turn_")) %>%
  left_join(
    fang_by_gold_turn %>%
      group_by(display_model, turn) %>%
      summarise(ordinal_bias = mean(signed_error), .groups = "drop") %>%
      filter(turn == max_turn) %>%
      transmute(display_model, `Turn 10 clinician clear-only` = ordinal_bias),
    by = "display_model"
  ) %>%
  mutate(`Change (Turn 10 - Turn 1)` = `Turn 10` - `Turn 1`) %>%
  select(display_model, all_of(paste0("Turn ", seq_len(max_turn))), `Change (Turn 10 - Turn 1)`, `Turn 10 clinician clear-only`)
```
