```{r}
  )

compute_question_transition_matrix <- function(events_df, split_var) {
  question_code_by_turn <- events_df %>%
    select(display_model, vignette_id, turn, all_of(split_var), all_of(question_code_cols)) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = all_of(question_code_cols),
      names_to = "code",
      values_to = "present"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      code = str_remove(code, "_majority$"),
      present = as.numeric(present)
    ) %>%
    filter(present == 1)
  
  question_code_by_turn %>%
    transmute(
      display_model,
      vignette_id,
      transition_turn = turn,
      split_value = .data[[split_var]],
      from_code = code
    ) %>%
    inner_join(
      question_code_by_turn %>%
        transmute(
          display_model,
          vignette_id,
          transition_turn = turn - 1L,
          to_code = code
        ),
      by = c("display_model", "vignette_id", "transition_turn")
    ) %>%
    filter(
      transition_turn >= 1L,
      transition_turn < max_turn,
      !is.na(split_value)
    ) %>%
    count(split_value, from_code, to_code, name = "n") %>%
    complete(
      split_value,
      from_code = question_code_order,
      to_code = question_code_order,
      fill = list(n = 0L)
    ) %>%
    group_by(split_value, from_code) %>%
    mutate(
      row_total = sum(n),
      probability = if_else(row_total > 0, n / row_total, NA_real_)
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      from_code = factor(from_code, levels = rev(question_code_turn_order)),
      to_code = factor(to_code, levels = question_code_turn_order),
      split_value = factor(as.character(split_value), levels = triage_levels),
      text_color = viridis_text_color(probability, c(0, max(probability, na.rm = TRUE))),
      text_label = if_else(probability >= 0.05, sprintf("%.0f", 100 * probability), "")
    )
}

question_transition_gold <- compute_question_transition_matrix(question_events, "gold_triage") %>%
  mutate(
    plot_fill = replace_na(probability, 0)
  )

fig_s5_transition <- ggplot(question_transition_gold, aes(x = to_code, y = from_code)) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = plot_fill), color = "white", linewidth = 0.30) +
  geom_text(aes(label = text_label, color = text_color), size = heatmap_label_size * 0.78, fontface = "bold") +
  facet_grid(. ~ split_value, labeller = as_labeller(triage_labels_short)) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "D",
    limits = c(0, max(question_transition_gold$probability, na.rm = TRUE)),
    labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
    name = "P(next code | current code)"
  ) +
  scale_color_identity(guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "Code at turn t + 1",
    y = "Code at turn t",
    title = NULL,
    subtitle = "Question-to-question transition probabilities by benchmark acuity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = base_font_size * 0.66),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.70),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: figure3_question_pathway_data
#| include: false
effect_palette <- c(
  "Upward revision" = "black",
  "Downward revision" = "black",
  "Not significant" = "#9CA3AF"
)

disclosure_category_palette <- c(
  "clinical symptom" = "#6B7280",
  "risk factor" = "#D32F2F",
  "precipitating / maintaining factor" = "#F59E0B",
  "relevant negative" = "#388E3C",
  "protective factor" = "#2563EB",
  "predisposing factor" = "#7C3AED"
)

figure4_linerange_width <- 0.75

plot_coeff_forest <- function(df, title, subtitle) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      disclosure_label = str_remove(as.character(label), "^New "),
      disclosure_label = factor(disclosure_label, levels = levels(disclosure_category_timing_summary$disclosure_label))
    )
  ggplot(df, aes(x = disclosure_label, y = coef, color = disclosure_label)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.35) +
    geom_linerange(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), linewidth = figure4_linerange_width) +
    geom_point(aes(fill = disclosure_label), shape = 21, color = "black", size = manuscript_point_size * 0.90, stroke = 0.65) +
    scale_color_manual(values = disclosure_category_palette, name = NULL, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = disclosure_category_palette, name = NULL, drop = FALSE, guide = "none") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Coefficient on forward triage change", title = title, subtitle = subtitle) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = base_font_size * 0.66),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.72),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
}

turn_alpha_values <- scales::rescale(seq_len(max_turn), to = c(0.08, 1), from = c(1, max_turn))
names(turn_alpha_values) <- paste0("Turn ", seq_len(max_turn))

disclosure_accuracy_turn_model <- disclosure_accuracy_turn_model %>%
  mutate(
    turn_alpha = unname(turn_alpha_values[as.character(turn_factor)]),
    point_fill = scales::alpha(model_palette[as.character(display_model)], turn_alpha)
  )

disclosure_accuracy_turn_average <- disclosure_accuracy_turn_average %>%
  mutate(
    turn_alpha = unname(turn_alpha_values[as.character(turn_factor)]),
    point_fill = scales::alpha("black", turn_alpha)
  )

plot_disclosure_metric <- function(metric, y_label, title, subtitle = NULL, y_limits = NULL, y_breaks = waiver(), y_percent = FALSE) {
  if (is.null(y_limits)) {
    y_limits <- metric_limits(c(disclosure_accuracy_turn_model[[metric]], disclosure_accuracy_turn_average[[metric]]), include_zero = TRUE)
  }
  reference_layer <- if (metric %in% c("accuracy", "signed_error")) {
    geom_hline(
      data = full_vignette_by_gold_average,
      aes(yintercept = .data[[metric]]),
      linetype = "dashed",
      color = "grey45",
      linewidth = 0.32
    )
  } else {
    NULL
  }
  ggplot(
    disclosure_accuracy_turn_model,
    aes(x = mean_disclosure, y = .data[[metric]], color = display_model, group = display_model)
  ) +
    reference_layer +
    geom_path(linewidth = 0.42, alpha = 0.45, lineend = "round") +
    geom_point(
      aes(fill = point_fill),
      shape = 21,
      size = manuscript_point_size * 0.90,
      stroke = 0.65,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    geom_path(
      data = disclosure_accuracy_turn_average,
      aes(x = mean_disclosure, y = .data[[metric]], group = gold_triage),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 1.05,
      alpha = 0.92,
      lineend = "round"
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = disclosure_accuracy_turn_average,
      aes(x = mean_disclosure, y = .data[[metric]], fill = point_fill),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      shape = 21,
      color = "black",
      size = manuscript_point_size * 0.90,
      stroke = 0.75
    ) +
    facet_grid(. ~ gold_triage, labeller = as_labeller(triage_labels_short)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = model_palette, name = NULL, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_identity() +
    scale_x_continuous(
      labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
      limits = c(0, 1),
      breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      labels = if (y_percent) label_percent(accuracy = 1) else waiver(),
      limits = y_limits,
      breaks = y_breaks
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Discriminative features disclosed",
      y = y_label,
      title = title,
      subtitle = subtitle
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "none",
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_font_size * 1.02)
    ) +
    guides(color = "none", fill = "none")
}

fit_turn_disclosure_coefficients <- function(turn_value) {
  turn_df <- triage_delta_df %>%
    filter(turn == turn_value, !is.na(forward_delta))

  fit <- lm(
    reformulate(
      c(disclosure_terms, question_code_order, "display_model", "presentation_cluster"),
      response = "forward_delta"
    ),
    data = turn_df
  )

  coef_table <- summary(fit)$coefficients
  purrr::map_dfr(disclosure_terms, function(term_value) {
    if (!term_value %in% rownames(coef_table)) {
      return(tibble(
        disclosure_term = term_value,
        user_message_turn = turn_value + 1L,
        coef = NA_real_,
        se = NA_real_
      ))
    }

    tibble(
      disclosure_term = term_value,
      user_message_turn = turn_value + 1L,
      coef = coef_table[term_value, "Estimate"],
      se = coef_table[term_value, "Std. Error"]
    )
  })
}

disclosure_turn_coeffs <- purrr::map_dfr(
  sort(unique(triage_delta_df$turn[is.finite(triage_delta_df$turn)])),
  fit_turn_disclosure_coefficients
) %>%
  mutate(
    coef_lower = coef - 1.96 * se,
    coef_upper = coef + 1.96 * se
  )

disclosure_timing_update_summary <- disclosure_category_timing_summary %>%
  left_join(disclosure_turn_coeffs, by = c("disclosure_term", "user_message_turn")) %>%
  left_join(disclosure_update_direction, by = "disclosure_label") %>%
  mutate(
    disclosure_probability = mean,
    disclosure_probability_label = if_else(
      !is.na(disclosure_probability) & disclosure_probability >= 0.005,
      sprintf("%.0f", 100 * disclosure_probability),
      ""
    ),
    update_direction = factor(update_direction, levels = c("Risk-increasing", "Risk-limiting")),
    disclosure_label = factor(disclosure_label, levels = levels(disclosure_update_direction$disclosure_label))
  )

fig3c_disclosure_update <- ggplot(
  disclosure_timing_update_summary,
  aes(x = user_message_turn, y = coef)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.30) +
  geom_linerange(
    aes(ymin = coef_lower, ymax = coef_upper, color = update_direction),
    linewidth = figure4_linerange_width,
    alpha = 0.35
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = disclosure_probability, fill = update_direction),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.45,
    alpha = 0.92
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = disclosure_probability_label),
    color = "white",
    size = heatmap_label_size * 0.90,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~disclosure_label, nrow = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = disclosure_update_direction_palette, name = NULL) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = disclosure_update_direction_palette, name = NULL) +
  scale_size_area(
    max_size = 8.5,
    limits = c(0, max(disclosure_timing_update_summary$disclosure_probability, na.rm = TRUE)),
    labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
    name = "P(new disclosure)"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq_len(disclosure_final_scored_turn + 1L)) +
  labs(
    x = "User message turn",
    y = "Triage-update weight",
    title = "C",
    subtitle = "When information arrived and how strongly it moved triage"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.68),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.68),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_font_size * 0.62),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.68),
    legend.title = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.72),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.24, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(0.38, "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.90)
  ) +
  guides(
    color = "none",
    fill = "none",
    size = guide_legend(nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE)
  )

question_disclosure_yield <- triage_delta_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(current_predicted_triage)) %>%
  select(current_predicted_triage, turn, all_of(question_code_order), all_of(disclosure_terms)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(question_code_order),
    names_to = "code",
    values_to = "question_present"
  ) %>%
  filter(question_present == 1) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(disclosure_terms),
    names_to = "disclosure_term",
    values_to = "n_new"
  ) %>%
  group_by(current_predicted_triage, code, disclosure_term) %>%
  summarise(
    probability = mean(n_new > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_count = mean(n_new, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_exchanges = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  complete(
    current_predicted_triage = factor(triage_levels, levels = triage_levels),
    code = question_code_order,
    disclosure_term = disclosure_terms,
    fill = list(probability = NA_real_, mean_count = NA_real_, n_exchanges = 0L)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    code_label = factor(
      question_code_axis_labels[code],
      levels = rev(question_code_axis_labels[question_code_turn_order])
    ),
    disclosure_label = factor(
      str_remove(disclosure_labels[disclosure_term], "^New "),
      levels = str_remove(unname(disclosure_labels[disclosure_terms]), "^New ")
    ),
    probability_label = if_else(is.na(probability), "", sprintf("%.0f", 100 * probability)),
    point_fill = triage_assumption_palette[as.character(current_predicted_triage)],
    text_color = contrast_text_color(point_fill)
  )

fig4a <- ggplot(
  question_disclosure_yield,
  aes(x = disclosure_label, y = code_label)
) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = probability, fill = current_predicted_triage),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.65,
    alpha = 0.88
  ) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = probability_label, color = text_color),
    size = heatmap_label_size,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  facet_grid(cols = vars(current_predicted_triage), labeller = as_labeller(triage_labels_short)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = triage_assumption_palette,
    breaks = triage_levels,
    labels = triage_labels_short,
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_color_identity(guide = "none") +
  scale_size_area(
    max_size = 8,
    labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, max(question_disclosure_yield$probability, na.rm = TRUE)),
    breaks = c(0.05, 0.10, 0.20),
    name = "P(new disclosure | code)"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = NULL,
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "What information each question type unlocked"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.25),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1, size = base_font_size * 0.64),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.70),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

```

```{r}
#| label: script_rigidity_data
#| include: false
# Per-conversation script rigidity (perseveration + silhouette adherence) and
# its association with triage error. Source measures are computed by
# scripts/conversation_phenotyping/analyze_script_adherence_error.py.
rigidity_df <- read_csv(
  "../analysis/conversation_phenotyping_turn10_continuation/sequence_clustering_expanded/adherence_error/per_conversation_adherence.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    correct_binary = as.integer(correct_binary),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    target_model_label = as.factor(target_model_label),
    perseveration = as.numeric(perseveration),
    adherence = as.numeric(adherence),
    abs_ordinal_error = as.numeric(abs_ordinal_error),
    sequence_length = as.numeric(sequence_length)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(perseveration))

persev_correct_mean <- mean(rigidity_df$perseveration[rigidity_df$correct_binary == 1], na.rm = TRUE)
persev_wrong_mean <- mean(rigidity_df$perseveration[rigidity_df$correct_binary == 0], na.rm = TRUE)

persev_mwu <- wilcox.test(perseveration ~ correct_binary, data = rigidity_df, exact = FALSE)
persev_mwu_p <- persev_mwu$p.value

persev_spearman <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(
  rigidity_df$perseveration, rigidity_df$abs_ordinal_error,
  method = "spearman", exact = FALSE
))
persev_rho <- unname(persev_spearman$estimate)
persev_rho_p <- persev_spearman$p.value

# Secondary rigidity measure: cluster-fit (silhouette) adherence.
adherence_mwu <- wilcox.test(adherence ~ correct_binary, data = rigidity_df, exact = FALSE)
adherence_mwu_p <- adherence_mwu$p.value
```

Because of the link between the question a chatbot asked and the concurrent triage disposition, and because that disposition tended to persist across turns, we reasoned that whole conversations should collapse onto a small number of recurring question scripts, each with its own characteristic errors. To test this, we represented each conversation as an ordered sequence of question categories, and computed conversation-by-conversation similarity as the normalized edit distance between two such sequences (i.e., how many insertions, deletions, or substitutions are needed to transform one sequence into another). Hierarchical clustering on the resulting (conversation × conversation) distance matrix revealed 3 distinct context-seeking clusters, each conforming to a prototypical sequence of AI chatbot questions (Figure 4). 

A first cluster focused on physical symptoms, repeatedly returned to physical health, neurological or organic, safeguarding, and immediacy questions, producing a relatively stable medical-risk pathway (Figure 4B) (hereafter, *physical context*, n = `r sum(sequence_cluster_substantive$cluster_short == "Physical context", na.rm = TRUE)` conversations). A second cluster focused on acute crisis safety assessment, focusing on suicidal ideation, harm to others, immediate danger, and safety planning or means, concentrating the conversation on imminent-risk clarification (hereafter, *acute context*, n = `r sum(sequence_cluster_substantive$cluster_short == "Acute context", na.rm = TRUE)` conversations). A third cluster was more diffuse, beginning with broad context elicitation and then branching into mental-state, neurovegetative, functioning, history, treatment, and support questions (hereafter, *broader context*, n = `r sum(sequence_cluster_substantive$cluster_short == "Broader context", na.rm = TRUE)` conversations). 

Broader context-seeking dominated routine A cases (`r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_urgency_pct("Broader context", "A"))`) and remained common in B cases (`r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_urgency_pct("Broader context", "B"))`), where broad psychiatric clarification may be appropriate but can also expose many concern-raising details. Acute context-seeking became more common in higher-acuity cases, reaching `r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_urgency_pct("Acute context", "C"))` of C cases and `r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_urgency_pct("Acute context", "D"))` of D cases. Physical context-seeking increased most strongly with urgency, accounting for `r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_urgency_pct("Physical context", "D"))` of emergency-level D cases (Figure 4C). At the vignette-design level, physical context-seeking was most visible when physical or neurocognitive compromise was central, acute context-seeking concentrated in self-harm and crisis-risk cells, and broader context-seeking appeared across broader psychiatric presentations (Figure S6). The clusters therefore mapped onto recognizable clinical hypotheses rather than arbitrary conversation styles.

Each type of context-seeking was associated with distinct error profiles (Figure 4D). Physical context-seeking recognized emergency presentations comparatively well (`r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_confusion_pct("Physical context", "D", "D"))` of D cases assigned D), but also pulled intermediate cases upward (`r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_confusion_pct("Physical context", "B", "C"))` of B cases assigned C). Acute context-seeking correctly assigned D in `r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_confusion_pct("Acute context", "D", "D"))` of emergency cases, but also moved `r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_confusion_pct("Acute context", "B", "C"))` of B cases to C and `r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_confusion_pct("Acute context", "C", "D"))` of C cases to D. Broader context-seeking preserved lower-acuity calibration better for A and B cases (`r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_confusion_pct("Broader context", "A", "A"))` and `r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_confusion_pct("Broader context", "B", "B"))` correct, respectively), but under-recognized emergencies: only `r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_confusion_pct("Broader context", "D", "D"))` of D cases were assigned D, whereas `r fmt_pct(sequence_cluster_confusion_pct("Broader context", "D", "C"))` remained at C.

```{r}
#| label: figure4_sequence_clusters_data
#| include: false
sequence_cluster_embedding <- read_csv(
  "../analysis/conversation_phenotyping_turn10_continuation/sequence_clustering_expanded/mds_embedding.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    sequence_cluster = as.character(sequence_cluster),
    cluster_name = recode(sequence_cluster, !!!sequence_cluster_labels, .default = NA_character_),
    cluster_short = factor(
      sequence_cluster_short_labels[cluster_name],
      levels = sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)]
    ),
    gold_triage = factor(as.character(gold_triage), levels = triage_levels)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(cluster_short))

sequence_cluster_embedding_centers <- sequence_cluster_embedding %>%
  group_by(cluster_short) %>%
  summarise(
    mds_1 = median(mds_1, na.rm = TRUE),
    mds_2 = median(mds_2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sequence_cluster_join_key <- sequence_cluster_substantive %>%
  mutate(
    display_model = factor(display_model(target_model_label), levels = names(model_palette))
  ) %>%
  select(
    display_model,
    model_id,
    target_model_label,
    vignette_id,
    sequence_cluster,
    cluster_name,
    cluster_short,
    presentation_cluster_pretty,
    risk_domain_pretty
  )

sequence_cluster_code_turn_profile <- question_long %>%
  inner_join(
    sequence_cluster_join_key %>%
      select(display_model, vignette_id, sequence_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_short),
    by = c("display_model", "vignette_id")
  ) %>%
  group_by(cluster_name, cluster_short, turn, code) %>%
  summarise(prevalence = mean(present, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  right_join(
    tidyr::expand_grid(
      cluster_name = factor(unname(sequence_cluster_labels), levels = unname(sequence_cluster_labels)),
      turn = seq_len(max_turn),
      code = question_code_order
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        cluster_short = factor(
          sequence_cluster_short_labels[as.character(cluster_name)],
          levels = sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)]
        )
      ),
    by = c("cluster_name", "cluster_short", "turn", "code")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    prevalence = replace_na(prevalence, 0),
    turn_label = factor(paste0("T", turn), levels = paste0("T", seq_len(max_turn))),
    code_label = factor(
      question_code_axis_labels[code],
      levels = rev(question_code_axis_labels[question_code_turn_order])
    )
  )

sequence_cluster_activation_bubbles <- sequence_cluster_prevalence_heatmap %>%
  mutate(
    plot_size = replace_na(prevalence, 0),
    plot_fill = prevalence
  )

sequence_cluster_flow_events <- question_long %>%
  inner_join(
    sequence_cluster_join_key %>%
      select(display_model, vignette_id, sequence_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_short),
    by = c("display_model", "vignette_id")
  ) %>%
  filter(present == 1) %>%
  distinct(display_model, vignette_id, cluster_name, cluster_short, turn, code)

sequence_cluster_flow_denominator <- sequence_cluster_join_key %>%
  count(cluster_name, cluster_short, name = "n_conversations")

sequence_cluster_flow_nodes <- sequence_cluster_code_turn_profile %>%
  group_by(cluster_name, cluster_short, turn, turn_label) %>%
  arrange(desc(prevalence), code, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(node_rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(node_rank <= 3, prevalence >= 0.10) %>%
  mutate(
    code_short = question_code_short_labels[code],
    node_label = paste0(code, "\n", sprintf("%.0f", 100 * prevalence)),
    y = case_when(
      node_rank == 1 ~ 0,
      node_rank == 2 ~ 0.78,
      TRUE ~ -0.78
    ),
    text_color = viridis_text_color(prevalence, c(0, max(prevalence, na.rm = TRUE)))
  )

sequence_cluster_flow_edges_raw <- sequence_cluster_flow_events %>%
  transmute(
    display_model,
    vignette_id,
    cluster_name,
    cluster_short,
    turn,
    from_code = code
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    sequence_cluster_flow_events %>%
      transmute(
        display_model,
        vignette_id,
        cluster_name,
        cluster_short,
        turn = turn - 1L,
        to_code = code
      ),
    by = c("display_model", "vignette_id", "cluster_name", "cluster_short", "turn")
  ) %>%
  filter(turn >= 1L, turn < max_turn) %>%
  count(cluster_name, cluster_short, turn, from_code, to_code, name = "n") %>%
  left_join(sequence_cluster_flow_denominator, by = c("cluster_name", "cluster_short")) %>%
  mutate(edge_prevalence = if_else(n_conversations > 0, n / n_conversations, NA_real_))

sequence_cluster_flow_node_positions <- sequence_cluster_flow_nodes %>%
  transmute(cluster_name, cluster_short, node_turn = turn, code, x = turn, y)

sequence_cluster_flow_edges <- sequence_cluster_flow_edges_raw %>%
  mutate(target_turn = turn + 1L) %>%
  left_join(
    sequence_cluster_flow_node_positions,
    by = c(
      "cluster_name",
      "cluster_short",
      "turn" = "node_turn",
      "from_code" = "code"
    )
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    sequence_cluster_flow_node_positions %>%
      rename(xend = x, yend = y),
    by = c(
      "cluster_name",
      "cluster_short",
      "target_turn" = "node_turn",
      "to_code" = "code"
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(x), !is.na(xend), !is.na(edge_prevalence)) %>%
  group_by(cluster_name, cluster_short, turn, from_code) %>%
  arrange(desc(edge_prevalence), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(edge_rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(edge_rank <= 2 | edge_prevalence >= 0.08) %>%
  mutate(
    x = x + 0.20,
    xend = xend - 0.20
  )

sequence_cluster_final_error_bubbles <- sequence_cluster_turn_df %>%
  filter(turn == max_turn) %>%
  group_by(cluster_name, cluster_short, presentation_cluster_pretty, risk_domain_pretty) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    p_under = mean(signed_error < 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_over = mean(signed_error > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    p_any_error = mean(signed_error != 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    over_under_balance = p_over - p_under,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  right_join(
    sequence_cluster_grid,
    by = c("cluster_name", "cluster_short", "presentation_cluster_pretty", "risk_domain_pretty")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    n = replace_na(n, 0L),
    p_any_error = if_else(n > 0, p_any_error, NA_real_),
    over_under_balance = if_else(n > 0, over_under_balance, NA_real_)
  )

sequence_cluster_final_disclosure_bubbles <- disclosure_analysis_df %>%
  filter(turn == disclosure_final_scored_turn) %>%
  inner_join(
    sequence_cluster_join_key %>%
      select(model_id, vignette_id, sequence_cluster, cluster_name, cluster_short, presentation_cluster_pretty, risk_domain_pretty),
    by = c("model_short" = "model_id", "vignette_id")
  ) %>%
  group_by(cluster_name, cluster_short, presentation_cluster_pretty, risk_domain_pretty) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_disclosure = mean(proportion_disclosed, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  right_join(
    sequence_cluster_grid,
    by = c("cluster_name", "cluster_short", "presentation_cluster_pretty", "risk_domain_pretty")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    n = replace_na(n, 0L),
    mean_disclosure = if_else(n > 0, mean_disclosure, NA_real_)
  )

sequence_cluster_level_grid <- tibble(
  cluster_name = factor(unname(sequence_cluster_labels), levels = unname(sequence_cluster_labels))
) %>%
  mutate(
    cluster_short = factor(
      sequence_cluster_short_labels[as.character(cluster_name)],
      levels = sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)]
    )
  )

sequence_cluster_confusion_by_model <- sequence_cluster_turn_df %>%
  filter(turn == max_turn, !is.na(predicted_triage), !is.na(gold_triage)) %>%
  count(display_model, cluster_name, cluster_short, gold_triage, predicted_triage, name = "n") %>%
  right_join(
    tidyr::expand_grid(
      display_model = factor(names(model_palette), levels = names(model_palette)),
      sequence_cluster_level_grid,
      gold_triage = factor(triage_levels, levels = triage_levels),
      predicted_triage = factor(triage_levels, levels = triage_levels)
    ),
    by = c("display_model", "cluster_name", "cluster_short", "gold_triage", "predicted_triage")
  ) %>%
  mutate(n = replace_na(n, 0L)) %>%
  group_by(display_model, cluster_name, cluster_short, gold_triage) %>%
  mutate(prop = if (sum(n) > 0) n / sum(n) else NA_real_) %>%
  ungroup()

sequence_cluster_confusion_average <- sequence_cluster_confusion_by_model %>%
  group_by(cluster_name, cluster_short, gold_triage, predicted_triage) %>%
  summarise(prop = mean(prop, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    cell_direction = purrr::map2_chr(gold_triage, predicted_triage, classify_confusion_cell),
    fill_color = purrr::map2_chr(
      cell_direction,
      prop,
      ~ blend_to_white(triage_direction_palette[[.x]], pmin(pmax(.y, 0), 1))
    ),
    text_color = contrast_text_color(fill_color),
    text_label = if_else(is.na(prop), "", sprintf("%.0f", 100 * prop))
  )

sequence_cluster_matrix_theme <- theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.22),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = base_font_size * 0.56),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.60),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.68),
    legend.title = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.72),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_font_size * 0.74),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.88)
  )

question_code_palette <- c(
  "SI" = "#991B1B",
  "SP" = "#DC2626",
  "HI" = "#7F1D1D",
  "SG" = "#EA580C",
  "NV" = "#F59E0B",
  "MS" = "#A16207",
  "NS" = "#2563EB",
  "SU" = "#7C3AED",
  "PH" = "#0891B2",
  "RF" = "#16A34A",
  "SS" = "#15803D",
  "TX" = "#0F766E",
  "HX" = "#64748B",
  "OE" = "#111827",
  "IM" = "#BE123C"
)

sequence_cluster_code_turn_profile <- sequence_cluster_code_turn_profile %>%
  mutate(
    y = as.numeric(factor(code, levels = rev(question_code_turn_order))),
    code_factor = factor(code, levels = question_code_order),
    prevalence_label = if_else(prevalence >= 0.05, sprintf("%.0f", 100 * prevalence), ""),
    text_color = contrast_text_color(question_code_palette[as.character(code)])
  )

sequence_cluster_sankey_edges <- sequence_cluster_flow_events %>%
  transmute(
    display_model,
    vignette_id,
    cluster_name,
    cluster_short,
    turn,
    from_code = code
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    sequence_cluster_flow_events %>%
      transmute(
        display_model,
        vignette_id,
        cluster_name,
        cluster_short,
        turn = turn - 1L,
        to_code = code
      ),
    by = c("display_model", "vignette_id", "cluster_name", "cluster_short", "turn")
  ) %>%
  filter(turn >= 1L, turn < max_turn) %>%
  count(cluster_name, cluster_short, turn, from_code, to_code, name = "n") %>%
  left_join(sequence_cluster_flow_denominator, by = c("cluster_name", "cluster_short")) %>%
  mutate(
    edge_prevalence = if_else(n_conversations > 0, n / n_conversations, NA_real_),
    from_y = as.numeric(factor(from_code, levels = rev(question_code_turn_order))),
    to_y = as.numeric(factor(to_code, levels = rev(question_code_turn_order))),
    from_code_factor = factor(from_code, levels = question_code_order)
  ) %>%
  group_by(cluster_name, cluster_short, turn) %>%
  arrange(desc(edge_prevalence), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(edge_rank = row_number()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(edge_prevalence > 0)

sequence_cluster_sankey_labels <- sequence_cluster_code_turn_profile %>%
  filter(prevalence > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    label = sprintf("%.0f", 100 * prevalence)
  )

fig4a_sequence_embedding <- ggplot(
  sequence_cluster_embedding,
  aes(x = mds_1, y = mds_2)
) +
  geom_point(
    aes(fill = cluster_short),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.25,
    alpha = 0.62,
    size = manuscript_point_size * 0.78
  ) +
  geom_label(
    data = sequence_cluster_embedding_centers,
    aes(label = cluster_short, fill = cluster_short),
    color = "white",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = base_font_size * 0.26,
    label.size = 0,
    label.padding = unit(0.10, "lines")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = sequence_cluster_palette, guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.30)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = 0.30)) +
  labs(
    x = "MDS 1",
    y = "MDS 2",
    title = "A",
    subtitle = "Edit-distance embedding of question sequences"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.66),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.84)
  )

fig4a_sequence_flow <- ggplot(
  sequence_cluster_code_turn_profile,
  aes(x = turn, y = y)
) +
  geom_curve(
    data = sequence_cluster_sankey_edges,
    aes(
      x = turn + 0.10,
      xend = turn + 0.90,
      y = from_y,
      yend = to_y,
      linewidth = edge_prevalence,
      color = from_code_factor
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    curvature = 0.28,
    alpha = 0.23,
    lineend = "round"
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = prevalence, fill = code_factor),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.30,
    alpha = 0.96
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = sequence_cluster_sankey_labels,
    aes(label = label),
    color = "white",
    size = heatmap_label_size * 0.56,
    fontface = "bold",
    lineheight = 0.82
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~cluster_short, nrow = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq_len(max_turn), expand = expansion(mult = c(0.06, 0.06))) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(rev(question_code_turn_order)),
    labels = question_code_axis_labels[rev(question_code_turn_order)],
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.08, 0.08))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = question_code_palette, name = "Question code") +
  scale_color_manual(values = question_code_palette, guide = "none") +
  scale_size_area(
    max_size = 8.0,
    limits = c(0, max(sequence_cluster_code_turn_profile$prevalence, na.rm = TRUE)),
    labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
    name = "P(code | turn)"
  ) +
  scale_linewidth(
    range = c(0.06, 3.4),
    limits = c(0, max(sequence_cluster_sankey_edges$edge_prevalence, na.rm = TRUE)),
    labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
    name = "P(transition)"
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Question turn",
    y = NULL,
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "How question codes unfold within each sequence phenotype"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.20),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.70),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.66),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_font_size * 0.80),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.68),
    legend.title = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.72),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.24, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(0.36, "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.88)
  ) +
  guides(fill = "none", size = "none", linewidth = "none")

sequence_cluster_by_urgency <- sequence_cluster_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(cluster_short), !is.na(gold_triage)) %>%
  count(gold_triage, cluster_short, name = "n") %>%
  complete(
    gold_triage = factor(triage_levels, levels = triage_levels),
    cluster_short = factor(sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)], levels = sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)]),
    fill = list(n = 0L)
  ) %>%
  group_by(gold_triage) %>%
  mutate(prevalence = if (sum(n) > 0) n / sum(n) else NA_real_) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    prevalence_label = if_else(!is.na(prevalence) & prevalence >= 0.03, sprintf("%.0f", 100 * prevalence), ""),
    text_color = viridis_text_color(prevalence, c(0, max(prevalence, na.rm = TRUE)))
  )

fig4b_sequence_urgency <- ggplot(
  sequence_cluster_by_urgency,
  aes(x = gold_triage, y = cluster_short)
) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = prevalence, fill = prevalence),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.30,
    alpha = 0.92
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = prevalence_label, color = text_color), size = heatmap_label_size * 0.82, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "D", limits = c(0, max(sequence_cluster_by_urgency$prevalence, na.rm = TRUE)), labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1), name = "P(cluster | level)") +
  scale_size_area(max_size = 7.2, limits = c(0, max(sequence_cluster_by_urgency$prevalence, na.rm = TRUE)), labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1), name = "P(cluster | level)") +
  scale_color_identity(guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "Benchmark urgency",
    y = NULL,
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "Sequence prevalence by urgency"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.20),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.72),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.70),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.84)
  ) +
  guides(size = "none", fill = "none")

sequence_cluster_transition_matrix <- sequence_cluster_flow_events %>%
  transmute(
    display_model,
    vignette_id,
    cluster_short,
    transition_turn = turn,
    from_code = code
  ) %>%
  inner_join(
    sequence_cluster_flow_events %>%
      transmute(
        display_model,
        vignette_id,
        cluster_short,
        transition_turn = turn - 1L,
        to_code = code
      ),
    by = c("display_model", "vignette_id", "cluster_short", "transition_turn")
  ) %>%
  filter(transition_turn >= 1L, transition_turn < max_turn) %>%
  count(cluster_short, from_code, to_code, name = "n") %>%
  complete(
    cluster_short = factor(sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)], levels = sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)]),
    from_code = question_code_order,
    to_code = question_code_order,
    fill = list(n = 0L)
  ) %>%
  group_by(cluster_short, from_code) %>%
  mutate(
    row_total = sum(n),
    probability = if_else(row_total > 0, n / row_total, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    from_code = factor(from_code, levels = rev(question_code_turn_order)),
    to_code = factor(to_code, levels = question_code_turn_order),
    probability_label = if_else(!is.na(probability) & probability >= 0.05, sprintf("%.0f", 100 * probability), ""),
    text_color = viridis_text_color(probability, c(0, max(probability, na.rm = TRUE)))
  )

fig4c_sequence_transitions <- ggplot(
  sequence_cluster_transition_matrix,
  aes(x = to_code, y = from_code)
) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = probability, fill = probability),
    shape = 21,
    color = "black",
    stroke = 0.22,
    alpha = 0.90
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = probability_label, color = text_color), size = heatmap_label_size * 0.70, fontface = "bold") +
  facet_wrap(~cluster_short, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "D", limits = c(0, max(sequence_cluster_transition_matrix$probability, na.rm = TRUE)), labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1), name = "P(next | current)") +
  scale_size_area(max_size = 6.3, limits = c(0, max(sequence_cluster_transition_matrix$probability, na.rm = TRUE)), labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1), name = "P(next | current)") +
  scale_color_identity(guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "Next code",
    y = "Current code",
    title = "C",
    subtitle = "Question-to-question transition probabilities by sequence phenotype"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.18),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = base_font_size * 0.56),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.60),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_font_size * 0.74),
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.text = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.66),
    legend.title = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.70),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.84)
  ) +
  guides(size = guide_legend(nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE), fill = "none")

sequence_cluster_activation_bubbles <- sequence_cluster_activation_bubbles %>%
  mutate(
    prevalence_label = if_else(!is.na(plot_fill) & plot_fill >= 0.03, sprintf("%.0f", 100 * plot_fill), ""),
    text_color = viridis_text_color(plot_fill, c(0, max(plot_fill, na.rm = TRUE)))
  )

fig4c_sequence_activation <- ggplot(
  sequence_cluster_activation_bubbles,
  aes(x = risk_domain_pretty, y = presentation_cluster_pretty)
) +
  geom_point(
    aes(size = plot_size, fill = cluster_short, alpha = plot_fill),
    shape = 21,
    color = "grey30",
    stroke = 0.25
  ) +
  geom_text(aes(label = prevalence_label), color = "grey15", size = heatmap_label_size * 0.72, fontface = "bold") +
  facet_wrap(~cluster_short, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = sequence_cluster_palette, guide = "none") +
  scale_alpha_continuous(range = c(0.28, 1), guide = "none") +
  scale_size_area(max_size = 7.0, limits = c(0, max(sequence_cluster_activation_bubbles$plot_size, na.rm = TRUE)), labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1), name = "Prevalence") +
  labs(
    x = "Primary risk dimension",
    y = NULL,
    title = NULL,
    subtitle = "Where each sequence phenotype was activated"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.20),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = base_font_size * 0.58),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.62),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_font_size * 0.78),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.70),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.86)
  ) +
  guides(size = guide_legend(nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE, override.aes = list(fill = "grey40", alpha = 1)))

sequence_cluster_by_urgency <- sequence_cluster_by_urgency %>%
  mutate(
    cluster_short = factor(cluster_short, levels = rev(sequence_cluster_short_labels[unname(sequence_cluster_labels)])),
    prevalence_label = if_else(!is.na(prevalence) & prevalence >= 0.05, sprintf("%.0f", 100 * prevalence), "")
  )

fig4b_sequence_urgency <- ggplot(
  sequence_cluster_by_urgency,
  aes(x = prevalence, y = gold_triage, fill = cluster_short)
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.58, color = "white", linewidth = 0.30, alpha = 0.94) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = prevalence_label),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    color = "white",
    size = heatmap_label_size * 0.78,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = sequence_cluster_palette,
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 1), expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.02))) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(triage_levels)) +
  labs(
    x = "Cluster prevalence",
    y = "Benchmark urgency",
    title = "C",
    subtitle = "Sequence prevalence by urgency"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.66),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.72),
    legend.position = "none",
    legend.text = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.62),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.24, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(0.34, "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.84)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, byrow = TRUE))

fig4d_sequence_confusion <- ggplot(
  sequence_cluster_confusion_average,
  aes(x = predicted_triage, y = gold_triage)
) +
  geom_tile(aes(fill = fill_color), color = "white", linewidth = 0.40) +
  geom_text(aes(label = text_label, color = text_color), size = heatmap_label_size * 0.84, fontface = "bold") +
  facet_wrap(~cluster_short, nrow = 1) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(triage_levels)) +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_color_identity() +
  labs(
    x = "Predicted triage",
    y = "Benchmark triage",
    title = "D",
    subtitle = "Final triage accuracy by sequence phenotype"
  ) +
  sequence_cluster_matrix_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.68),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.68),
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.margin = margin(t = 4, r = 4, b = 4, l = 22)
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: figure_4_context_sequences
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 12.5
#| fig-height: 7.5
#| out-width: 100%
figure4_top <- gridExtra::arrangeGrob(
  fig4a_sequence_embedding,
  fig4a_sequence_flow,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(0.729, 1.271)
)

figure4_bottom <- gridExtra::arrangeGrob(
  fig4b_sequence_urgency,
  fig4d_sequence_confusion,
  ncol = 2,
  widths = c(0.729, 1.271)
)

gridExtra::grid.arrange(
  figure4_top,
  figure4_bottom,
  ncol = 1,
  heights = c(1.0, 0.5)
)
```

**Figure 4.** Context-seeking at the conversational level. Each conversation was represented as an ordered sequence of question categories and compared to every other conversation by normalized edit distance; average-linkage hierarchical clustering on the resulting (conversation × conversation) distance matrix yielded three clinically interpretable context-seeking phenotypes: physical context, acute context, and broader context. **A.** Two-dimensional multidimensional-scaling (MDS) projection of the edit-distance matrix, in which each point is one conversation and closer points denote more similar question sequences; points are colored by question-sequence phenotype. **B.** Question flow across turns within each phenotype. Nodes are question categories, sized by how often the category was asked. Connections are thicker when a transition between question types was more common. **C.** Fraction of conversations at each benchmark urgency level (A–D) that followed each phenotype, showing which context-seeking strategy dominated at each level of true urgency. **D.** Average confusion matrices within each phenotype (faceted by phenotype); rows are benchmark triage and columns predicted triage, cells are colored as in Figure 2 (blue correct, green over-triage, red under-triage) with saturation scaled by cell proportion, and each row sums to 100%.

```{r}
#| label: figure5_perseveration_data
#| include: false

# Panel A: per-conversation perseveration by final-turn triage outcome
# (under-triage / correct / over-triage), regardless of error magnitude.
# Faint points are individual conversations (vignette x chatbot) colored by model.
persev_outcome <- rigidity_df %>%
  filter(is.finite(perseveration), !is.na(under_over_triage)) %>%
  mutate(
    display_model = factor(
      display_model(as.character(target_model_label)),
      levels = names(model_palette)
    ),
    triage_outcome = factor(
      recode(
        as.character(under_over_triage),
        "correct" = "Correct",
        "under_triage" = "Under-triage",
        "over_triage" = "Over-triage"
      ),
      levels = c("Under-triage", "Correct", "Over-triage")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_model), !is.na(triage_outcome))

# Aggregate per chatbot within each outcome group (one point per model) to avoid
# an overcrowded per-conversation cloud.
persev_outcome_by_model <- persev_outcome %>%
  group_by(triage_outcome, display_model) %>%
  summarise(perseveration = mean(perseveration), n = n(), .groups = "drop")

persev_outcome_summary <- persev_outcome_by_model %>%
  group_by(triage_outcome) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(perseveration),
    se = sd(perseveration) / sqrt(n()),
    lower = pmax(0, mean - 1.96 * se),
    upper = mean + 1.96 * se,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

fig5a_persev_error <- ggplot(persev_outcome_by_model, aes(x = triage_outcome, y = perseveration)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = display_model), width = 0.16, height = 0, alpha = 0.85,
              size = manuscript_point_size * 0.75) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = persev_outcome_summary,
    aes(x = triage_outcome, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = persev_outcome_summary, aes(x = triage_outcome, y = mean),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black", size = manuscript_point_size * 1.1
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = model_palette, name = NULL, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Perseveration",
    title = "A", subtitle = "Perseveration by triage outcome"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

# Panel B: human vs AI perseveration at matched intervention points, aggregated
# per chatbot (each chatbot's rate averaged across all of its vignettes / intervention points)
# so both AI and clinician rates are continuous per-model values.
# Source: scripts/human_next_question/check_human_repetitiveness.py.
persev_ha_items <- read_csv(
  "../analysis/human_next_question/output/human_ai_perseveration_items.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
)
persev_ha_by_model <- persev_ha_items %>%
  mutate(display_model = factor(display_model(model_short), levels = names(model_palette))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(display_model)) %>%
  group_by(display_model) %>%
  summarise(
    `AI chatbot` = mean(ai_repeat),
    `Human clinician` = mean(human_repeat_frac),
    n_items = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

persev_ha_ai_rate <- mean(persev_ha_by_model$`AI chatbot`)
persev_ha_human_rate <- mean(persev_ha_by_model$`Human clinician`)
persev_ha_n_models <- nrow(persev_ha_by_model)
persev_ha_n_ai_higher <- sum(persev_ha_by_model$`AI chatbot` > persev_ha_by_model$`Human clinician`)
persev_ha_test <- suppressWarnings(wilcox.test(
  persev_ha_by_model$`AI chatbot`, persev_ha_by_model$`Human clinician`,
  paired = TRUE, exact = FALSE
))
persev_ha_p <- persev_ha_test$p.value

persev_ha_long <- persev_ha_by_model %>%
  select(display_model, `AI chatbot`, `Human clinician`) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    c(`AI chatbot`, `Human clinician`),
    names_to = "source", values_to = "repeat_rate"
  ) %>%
  mutate(source = factor(source, levels = c("AI chatbot", "Human clinician")))

persev_ha_summary <- persev_ha_long %>%
  group_by(source) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(repeat_rate),
    se = sd(repeat_rate) / sqrt(n()),
    lower = pmax(0, mean - 1.96 * se),
    upper = mean + 1.96 * se,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

fig5b_persev_ha <- ggplot(persev_ha_long, aes(x = source, y = repeat_rate)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = display_model), size = manuscript_point_size * 0.75, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_linerange(
    data = persev_ha_summary,
    aes(x = source, ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = persev_ha_summary, aes(x = source, y = mean),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "black", size = manuscript_point_size * 1.1
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = model_palette, name = NULL, drop = FALSE) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Returned to preceding line of questioning",
    title = "B", subtitle = "Perseveration in clinicians versus chatbots"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

# Shared model color legend for panels A and B.
persev_models_present <- names(model_palette)[
  names(model_palette) %in% union(
    as.character(na.omit(unique(persev_outcome$display_model))),
    as.character(na.omit(unique(persev_ha_by_model$display_model)))
  )
]
persev_model_legend_plot <- ggplot(
  tibble(
    display_model = factor(persev_models_present, levels = names(model_palette)),
    x = seq_along(persev_models_present), y = 1
  ),
  aes(x, y, color = display_model)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = model_palette, name = NULL, drop = FALSE) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1, byrow = TRUE, override.aes = list(size = 2.4))) +
  theme_void(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(legend.position = "left",
        legend.text = element_text(size = base_font_size * 0.72),
        legend.key.height = unit(0.8, "lines"))
persev_model_legend <- extract_legend(persev_model_legend_plot)
```

Having characterized context-seeking across whole conversations, we next examined it turn-by-turn, asking whether a chatbot's tendency to return to the same line of questioning was itself linked to triage errors irrespective of its overarching context-seeking behavior. 

For each conversation we computed the fraction of consecutive turns in which the AI chatbot returned to a question category already raised in the preceding turn. Perseveration was higher when the final triage disposition was inaccurate (`r fmt_pct(persev_wrong_mean)` versus `r fmt_pct(persev_correct_mean)` of turn transitions, Mann-Whitney P `r fmt_p(persev_mwu_p)`; Figure 5A), and scaled with the magnitude of mis-triage (R = `r sprintf("%+.2f", persev_rho)`, P `r fmt_p(persev_rho_p)`).

To ask whether this rigidity was specific to chatbots, we compared each chatbot's actual next question with the next question proposed by one of `r n_human_raters` verified clinicians, who were shown the identical preceding transcript at the `r n_human_moments` intervention points, defined turns at which a chatbot's next question was followed by a change in its triage disposition on the subsequent turn (Methods). At these intervention points, clinicians returned to the immediately preceding line of questioning less often than the chatbots (`r fmt_pct(persev_ha_human_rate)` versus `r fmt_pct(persev_ha_ai_rate)`, Wilcoxon P `r fmt_p(persev_ha_p)`; Figure 5B), indicating that perseveration reflected a chatbot-specific questioning style rather than a property of the intervention points themselves. Consistent with this, clinicians more often asked about history, social support, and treatment, whereas chatbots more often asked about suicidal ideation, physical health, and immediate danger (Figure 5C).

Together, these findings show that context-seeking shapes triage accuracy in two ways. First, which line of questioning a chatbot pursues creates a trade-off: escalation-sensitive context-seeking (acute- and physical-context) surfaced urgent risk but over-escalated milder presentations, whereas broader context-seeking protected lower-acuity calibration but under-recognized emergencies. Second, how rigidly a chatbot held to a line of questioning — independent of its higher level context-seeking strategy  — was linked to triage error. 

A model-by-model summary of the triage-accuracy, safety, and context-seeking metrics reported throughout is provided in Figure S7.

```{r}
#| label: figure5_question_prevalence_text_data
#| include: false
triage_change_question_prevalence_text <- triage_delta_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(forward_delta), forward_delta != 0) %>%
  select(display_model, all_of(question_code_order)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(question_code_order),
    names_to = "code",
    values_to = "present"
  ) %>%
  group_by(display_model, code) %>%
  summarise(prevalence = mean(present, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(code) %>%
  summarise(prevalence = mean(prevalence, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

triage_change_question_prevalence_value <- function(code_value) {
  value <- triage_change_question_prevalence_text %>%
    filter(code == code_value) %>%
    pull(prevalence)
  if (length(value) == 0) NA_real_ else value[1]
}
```

```{r}
#| label: figure5_counterfactual_data
#| include: false
human_question_cf_df <- read_csv(
  "../analysis/human_question_counterfactuals_turn10/question_counterfactual_paired_branches_dataframe.csv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    turn = as.integer(turn),
    relative_turn = as.integer(relative_turn),
    display_model = factor(display_model(model_short), levels = names(model_palette)),
    pre_response_triage = factor(as.character(pre_response_triage), levels = triage_levels),
    branch = factor(
      branch,
      levels = c("Original-question replay", "Clinician question")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(pre_response_triage),
    !is.na(relative_turn)
  )

human_question_cf_relative_summary <- human_question_cf_df %>%
  group_by(
    branch,
    gold_triage,
    relative_turn
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    accuracy = mean(triage_match, na.rm = TRUE),
    accuracy_sem = sd(as.numeric(triage_match), na.rm = TRUE) /
      sqrt(sum(!is.na(triage_match))),
    n_observations = sum(!is.na(triage_match)),
    n_branches = n_distinct(pair_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    accuracy_sem = replace_na(accuracy_sem, 0),
    ci_multiplier = qt(0.975, pmax(n_observations - 1, 1)),
    lower = pmax(0, accuracy - ci_multiplier * accuracy_sem),
    upper = pmin(1, accuracy + ci_multiplier * accuracy_sem),
    gold_triage = factor(gold_triage, levels = triage_levels)
  )

human_question_cf_error_summary <- human_question_cf_df %>%
  group_by(
    branch,
    gold_triage,
    relative_turn
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    signed_error = mean(signed_error, na.rm = TRUE),
    signed_error_sem = sd(signed_error, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(signed_error))),
    n_observations = sum(!is.na(signed_error)),
    n_branches = n_distinct(pair_id),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    signed_error_sem = replace_na(signed_error_sem, 0),
    ci_multiplier = qt(0.975, pmax(n_observations - 1, 1)),
    lower = signed_error - ci_multiplier * signed_error_sem,
    upper = signed_error + ci_multiplier * signed_error_sem,
    gold_triage = factor(gold_triage, levels = triage_levels)
  )

human_question_cf_final <- human_question_cf_df %>%
  group_by(pair_id, branch) %>%
  slice_max(turn, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(pair_id, gold_triage, branch, triage_match) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = branch, values_from = triage_match)

human_question_cf_final_predictions <- human_question_cf_df %>%
  group_by(pair_id, branch) %>%
  slice_max(turn, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(pair_id, gold_triage, branch, predicted_triage) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = branch, values_from = predicted_triage)

human_question_cf_confusion_difference <- tidyr::crossing(
  gold_triage = triage_levels,
  predicted_triage = triage_levels
) %>%
  purrr::pmap_dfr(function(gold_triage, predicted_triage) {
    cell_pairs <- human_question_cf_final_predictions %>%
      filter(.data$gold_triage == .env$gold_triage)

    replay_cell <- cell_pairs$`Original-question replay` == predicted_triage
    clinician_cell <- cell_pairs$`Clinician question` == predicted_triage
    replay_only <- sum(replay_cell & !clinician_cell, na.rm = TRUE)
    clinician_only <- sum(!replay_cell & clinician_cell, na.rm = TRUE)
    discordant <- replay_only + clinician_only

    tibble(
      gold_triage = gold_triage,
      predicted_triage = predicted_triage,
      `Original-question replay` = mean(replay_cell, na.rm = TRUE),
      `Clinician question` = mean(clinician_cell, na.rm = TRUE),
      p_value = if (discordant > 0) {
        binom.test(
          min(replay_only, clinician_only),
          discordant,
          p = 0.5
        )$p.value
      } else {
        1
      }
    )
  }) %>%
  mutate(
    probability_difference = `Clinician question` - `Original-question replay`,
    p_holm = p.adjust(p_value, method = "holm"),
    significance = case_when(
      p_value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p_value < 0.01 ~ "**",
      p_value < 0.05 ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    gold_triage = factor(gold_triage, levels = rev(triage_levels)),
    predicted_triage = factor(predicted_triage, levels = triage_levels),
    difference_label = if_else(
      abs(probability_difference) < 0.005,
      paste0("0%", significance),
      sprintf("%+.1f%%%s", 100 * probability_difference, significance)
    )
  )

human_question_cf_stats <- human_question_cf_final %>%
  group_by(gold_triage) %>%
  group_modify(~{
    replay <- as.numeric(.x$`Original-question replay`)
    clinician <- as.numeric(.x$`Clinician question`)
    paired_difference <- clinician - replay
    replay_only <- sum(replay == 1 & clinician == 0)
    clinician_only <- sum(replay == 0 & clinician == 1)
    discordant <- replay_only + clinician_only
    difference_sem <- sd(paired_difference) / sqrt(length(paired_difference))
    tibble(
      n = length(paired_difference),
      replay_accuracy = mean(replay),
      clinician_accuracy = mean(clinician),
      accuracy_difference = mean(paired_difference),
      difference_lower = mean(paired_difference) - qnorm(0.975) * difference_sem,
      difference_upper = mean(paired_difference) + qnorm(0.975) * difference_sem,
      p_value = if (
        discordant > 0
      ) binom.test(
        min(replay_only, clinician_only),
        discordant,
        p = 0.5
      )$p.value else 1
    )
  }) %>%
  ungroup()

human_question_cf_final_error <- human_question_cf_df %>%
  group_by(pair_id, branch) %>%
  slice_max(turn, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(pair_id, gold_triage, branch, signed_error) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = branch, values_from = signed_error)

human_question_cf_final_bias <- human_question_cf_final_error %>%
  mutate(
    error_difference = `Clinician question` - `Original-question replay`,
    replay_over_triage = `Original-question replay` > 0,
    clinician_over_triage = `Clinician question` > 0,
    replay_under_triage = `Original-question replay` < 0,
    clinician_under_triage = `Clinician question` < 0
  )

human_question_cf_bias_test <- t.test(
  human_question_cf_final_bias$error_difference
)

human_question_cf_over_triage_test <- with(
  human_question_cf_final_bias,
  {
    replay_only <- sum(replay_over_triage & !clinician_over_triage, na.rm = TRUE)
    clinician_only <- sum(!replay_over_triage & clinician_over_triage, na.rm = TRUE)
    binom.test(
      min(replay_only, clinician_only),
      replay_only + clinician_only,
      p = 0.5
    )
  }
)

human_question_cf_under_triage_test <- with(
  human_question_cf_final_bias,
  {
    replay_only <- sum(replay_under_triage & !clinician_under_triage, na.rm = TRUE)
    clinician_only <- sum(!replay_under_triage & clinician_under_triage, na.rm = TRUE)
    binom.test(
      min(replay_only, clinician_only),
      replay_only + clinician_only,
      p = 0.5
    )
  }
)

cf_replay_error <- mean(
  human_question_cf_final_bias$`Original-question replay`,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
cf_clinician_error <- mean(
  human_question_cf_final_bias$`Clinician question`,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
cf_error_difference <- mean(
  human_question_cf_final_bias$error_difference,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
cf_replay_over_triage <- mean(
  human_question_cf_final_bias$replay_over_triage,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
cf_clinician_over_triage <- mean(
  human_question_cf_final_bias$clinician_over_triage,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
cf_replay_under_triage <- mean(
  human_question_cf_final_bias$replay_under_triage,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
cf_clinician_under_triage <- mean(
  human_question_cf_final_bias$clinician_under_triage,
  na.rm = TRUE
)

human_question_cf_immediate <- human_question_cf_df %>%
  filter(relative_turn == 1) %>%
  select(pair_id, branch, signed_error) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = branch, values_from = signed_error) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(`Original-question replay`),
    !is.na(`Clinician question`)
  ) %>%
  mutate(error_difference = `Clinician question` - `Original-question replay`)

cf_immediate_replay_error <- mean(
  human_question_cf_immediate$`Original-question replay`,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
cf_immediate_clinician_error <- mean(
  human_question_cf_immediate$`Clinician question`,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
cf_immediate_difference <- mean(
  human_question_cf_immediate$error_difference,
  na.rm = TRUE
)
cf_immediate_test <- t.test(human_question_cf_immediate$error_difference)
cf_immediate_p_text <- if (cf_immediate_test$p.value < 0.001) {
  "P < 0.001"
} else {
  sprintf("P = %.3f", cf_immediate_test$p.value)
}

n_human_counterfactual_branches <- n_distinct(human_question_cf_df$pair_id)

cf_stat <- function(level, variable) {
  value <- human_question_cf_stats %>%
    filter(gold_triage == level) %>%
    pull({{ variable }})
  value[1]
}

cf_result_text <- function(level) {
  sprintf(
    "%+.1f%%, P = %s)",
    100 * cf_stat(level, accuracy_difference),
    100 * cf_stat(level, difference_lower),
    100 * cf_stat(level, difference_upper),
    format.pval(cf_stat(level, p_value), digits = 2, eps = 0.001)
  )
}

```

```{r}
#| label: figure5_human_question_data
#| include: false
human_code_order <- human_prevalence %>%
  mutate(code = as.character(code)) %>%
  filter(code %in% question_code_turn_order) %>%
  arrange(match(code, question_code_turn_order)) %>%
  pull(code)

triage_change_events <- triage_delta_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(forward_delta), forward_delta != 0) %>%
  mutate(
    revision_direction = factor(
      if_else(forward_delta > 0, "Upward revision", "Downward revision"),
      levels = c("Upward revision", "Downward revision")
    ),
    transition = factor(
      paste0(turn, " to ", turn + 1L),
      levels = paste0(seq_len(max_turn - 1L), " to ", seq_len(max_turn - 1L) + 1L)
    )
  )

revision_palette <- c(
  "Upward revision" = "#B91C1C",
  "Downward revision" = "#2563EB"
)

triage_change_question_prevalence_model <- triage_change_events %>%
  select(display_model, all_of(question_code_order)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(question_code_order),
    names_to = "code",
    values_to = "present"
  ) %>%
  group_by(display_model, code) %>%
  summarise(prevalence = mean(present, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  complete(
    display_model,
    code = question_code_order,
    fill = list(prevalence = 0)
  )

triage_change_question_prevalence <- triage_change_question_prevalence_model %>%
  group_by(code) %>%
  summarise(mean_ci_95(prevalence), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    code_label = factor(
      paste0(code, " (", question_code_short_labels[code], ")"),
      levels = rev(paste0(human_code_order, " (", question_code_short_labels[human_code_order], ")"))
    ),
    text_label = if_else(mean >= 0.005, sprintf("%.0f", 100 * mean), ""),
    text_x = pmin(mean + 0.018, max(mean, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.08)
  )

triage_change_question_prevalence_value <- function(code_value) {
  value <- triage_change_question_prevalence %>%
    filter(code == code_value) %>%
    pull(mean)
  if (length(value) == 0) NA_real_ else value[1]
}

question_transition_by_code_model <- triage_delta_df %>%
  filter(!is.na(current_predicted_triage), !is.na(next_predicted_triage)) %>%
  select(display_model, current_predicted_triage, next_predicted_triage, all_of(question_code_order)) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(question_code_order),
    names_to = "code",
    values_to = "present"
  ) %>%
  filter(present == 1) %>%
  count(display_model, code, current_predicted_triage, next_predicted_triage, name = "n") %>%
  complete(
    display_model,
    code = question_code_order,
    current_predicted_triage = factor(triage_levels, levels = triage_levels),
    next_predicted_triage = factor(triage_levels, levels = triage_levels),
    fill = list(n = 0L)
  ) %>%
  group_by(display_model, code, current_predicted_triage) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(n, na.rm = TRUE),
    probability = if_else(total > 0, n / total, NA_real_)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

question_transition_by_code <- question_transition_by_code_model %>%
  group_by(code, current_predicted_triage, next_predicted_triage) %>%
  summarise(probability = mean(probability, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    is_change = current_predicted_triage != next_predicted_triage,
    probability = if_else(is_change, probability, NA_real_),
    transition_direction = purrr::map2_chr(
      current_predicted_triage,
      next_predicted_triage,
      ~ classify_confusion_cell(.x, .y)
    ),
    transition_direction = if_else(is_change, transition_direction, NA_character_),
    text_label = if_else(!is.na(probability) & probability >= 0.005, sprintf("%.0f", 100 * probability), ""),
    code_facet_label = factor(
      paste0(code, " (", question_code_short_labels[code], ")"),
      levels = paste0(question_code_turn_order, " (", question_code_short_labels[question_code_turn_order], ")")
    )
  )

figure5_transition_probability_limit <- max(question_transition_by_code$probability, na.rm = TRUE)
figure5_transition_fill_scale <- scales::col_numeric(
  palette = c("#F3E8FF", "#6D28D9"),
  domain = c(0, figure5_transition_probability_limit)
)

question_transition_by_code <- question_transition_by_code %>%
  mutate(
    fill_color = if_else(is.na(probability), "grey94", figure5_transition_fill_scale(probability)),
    text_color = contrast_text_color(fill_color)
  )

human_question_long <- human_ratings %>%
  mutate(
    presentation_cluster_pretty = factor(
      recode(as.character(presentation_cluster), !!!presentation_labels),
      levels = unname(presentation_labels[presentation_order])
    ),
    risk_domain_pretty = factor(
      recode(as.character(risk_domain), !!!risk_domain_labels),
      levels = unname(risk_domain_labels[risk_domain_order])
    )
  ) %>%
  select(
    presentation_cluster_pretty,
    risk_domain_pretty,
    all_of(paste0("human_", question_code_order)),
    all_of(paste0("ai_", question_code_order))
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^(human|ai)_"),
    names_to = c("source", "code"),
    names_pattern = "^(human|ai)_(.*)$",
    values_to = "present"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    source = factor(
      recode(source, human = "Human clinician", ai = "AI chatbot"),
      levels = c("Human clinician", "AI chatbot")
    ),
    code_label = factor(
      paste0(code, " (", question_code_short_labels[code], ")"),
      levels = rev(paste0(human_code_order, " (", question_code_short_labels[human_code_order], ")"))
    )
  )

human_ai_prevalence_summary <- human_question_long %>%
  group_by(source, code, code_label) %>%
  summarise(prevalence = mean(present, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = source, values_from = prevalence, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(
    delta = `Human clinician` - `AI chatbot`,
    code_label_delta = factor(
      code_label,
      levels = rev(paste0(human_code_order, " (", question_code_short_labels[human_code_order], ")"))
    )
  )

human_ai_prevalence_long <- human_ai_prevalence_summary %>%
  select(code, code_label_delta, `Human clinician`, `AI chatbot`) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(`Human clinician`, `AI chatbot`),
    names_to = "source",
    values_to = "prevalence"
  ) %>%
  mutate(source = factor(source, levels = c("Human clinician", "AI chatbot")))

question_transition_by_code <- question_transition_by_code %>%
  mutate(
    code_facet_label = factor(
      code_facet_label,
      levels = paste0(human_code_order, " (", question_code_short_labels[human_code_order], ")")
    )
  )

fig_s11_transition_by_code <- ggplot(
  question_transition_by_code,
  aes(x = next_predicted_triage, y = current_predicted_triage, fill = probability)
) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.28) +
  geom_text(aes(label = text_label, color = text_color), size = heatmap_label_size) +
  facet_wrap(~code_facet_label, ncol = 5) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(triage_levels)) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "#F3E8FF",
    high = "#6D28D9",
    na.value = "grey94",
    limits = c(0, figure5_transition_probability_limit),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_color_identity(guide = "none") +
  labs(
    x = "Next triage disposition",
    y = "Current triage disposition",
    title = "B",
    subtitle = "Triage update probabilities by question code"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

fig5a_human <- ggplot(
  human_ai_prevalence_long,
  aes(x = code_label_delta, y = prevalence, fill = code, alpha = source)
  ) +
  geom_col(
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.58),
    width = 0.42,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.18
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = question_code_palette, guide = "none") +
  scale_alpha_manual(
    values = c("Human clinician" = 0.48, "AI chatbot" = 0.96),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "% of sampled intervention points",
    title = "A",
    subtitle = "AI and clinician question types at the same intervention points"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_font_size) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  guides(alpha = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = "grey35")))

fig5b_human <- ggplot(human_ai_prevalence_long, aes(x = prevalence, y = code_label_delta, fill = source)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = human_ai_prevalence_summary,
    aes(x = `Human clinician`, xend = `AI chatbot`, y = code_label_delta, yend = code_label_delta),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,

  ) +
  geom_point(shape = 21, color = "black", size = manuscript_point_size * 0.90, stroke = 0.65) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Human clinician" = "#2563EB", "AI chatbot" = "#F59E0B"), name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1),
    limits = c(0, max(human_ai_prevalence_long$prevalence, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.08)

  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "bottom",
```
